          <p class="text-xs text-jade-600/80 leading-relaxed">
            “留白天地宽”，水墨画最贵在意境的虚实相生。多一笔则满，少一笔则空，追求精神的洒脱与无限的想象。
          </p>
          <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-jade-500/10 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gold-500 font-semibold">
            <span>探索墨韵</span>

          </div>
        </div>

          <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border border-jade-500/20 flex items-center justify-center bg-parchment-100 mb-6 group-hover:border-cinnabar-500/50 transition-colors">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-gem text-xl text-jade-600 group-hover:text-cinnabar-500 transition-colors"></i>
          </div>
          
          <h3 class="font-serif text-lg font-semibold text-jade-800 mb-2">翠玉玲珑 / Precious Jade</h3>
          <p class="text-xs text-jade-600/80 leading-relaxed">
            君子比德于玉，温润而泽。古典器物不求闪耀夺目，而求手感温润，色泽古朴雅致，于内敛中现乾坤。
          </p>
          <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-jade-500/10 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gold-500 font-semibold">
            <span>鉴赏金玉</span>
            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right-long group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform"></i>
          </div>
        </div>

          <h3 class="font-serif text-lg font-semibold text-jade-800 mb-2">雅乐天籁 / Ethereal Music</h3>
          <p class="text-xs text-jade-600/80 leading-relaxed">
            五音相谐，宫商角徵羽。古筝之清越、古琴之旷远、竹笛之空灵，洗涤尘嚣，静听山河风雨声。
          </p>
          <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-jade-500/10 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gold-500 font-semibold">
            <span>静心倾听</span>

          </div>
        </div>

          </div>
          
          <h3 class="font-serif text-lg font-semibold text-jade-800 mb-2">庭院山水 / Sacred Gardens</h3>
          <p class="text-xs text-jade-600/80 leading-relaxed">
            虽由人作，宛自天开。一桥一水、亭台楼阁，将浩瀚的自然山水浓缩于咫尺庭院之中，天人合一。
          </p>
          <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-dashed border-jade-500/10 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gold-500 font-semibold">

  <!-- INTERACTIVE SCROLL SHOWCASE (長卷) -->
  <section id="scroll" class="py-24 px-6 border-t border-gold-400/10 bg-parchment-200 overflow-hidden relative">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
      
      <!-- Header -->
      <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-12">
        <div>
          <div class="inline-block p-1 border-b border-gold-400/30 pb-2 mb-2">
            <span class="font-calligraphy text-xl text-cinnabar-500">水墨丹青</span>
          </div>
          <h2 class="font-serif text-3xl font-semibold text-jade-900 tracking-wider">传世历史长卷 / The Living Scroll</h2>
          <p class="text-xs text-gold-500 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Interactive Scroll Exploration</p>
        </div>
        <p class="max-w-md text-xs text-jade-600 leading-relaxed mt-4 md:mt-0">
          点击下方两侧按钮或在长卷上左右拖拽，如同缓缓展开千年宣纸古画，饱览高山流水、雅士品茗、落日余晖。
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- The Horizontal Interactive Scroll Wrapper -->

              <svg class="w-full h-full transform -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 100 100">

                <!-- Jade Ring filled to 60% -->
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#3d6754" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="251.2" stroke-dashoffset="100.5" class="transition-all duration-1000"></circle>
              </svg>
              <span class="absolute text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-jade-900">60%</span>
            </div>
            <h4 class="font-serif font-bold text-sm text-jade-800 mt-4 mb-1">笔法风骨 / Calligraphy Force</h4>
            <p class="text-[11px] text-jade-500/80 leading-relaxed">藏锋处如龙虎之威，提按轻重展现传统书法的力量之感。</p>
          </div>

          <!-- Circle 3: Natural Harmony -->
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center p-6 bg-white/40 border border-jade-500/5 rounded-xs shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
            <div class="relative w-36 h-36 flex items-center justify-center">
              <svg class="w-full h-full transform -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#ccd9d0" stroke-width="4" fill="none" opacity="0.3"></circle>
                <!-- Jade Ring filled to 45% -->
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#3d6754" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="251.2" stroke-dashoffset="138.1" class="transition-all duration-1000"></circle>
              </svg>
              <span class="absolute text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-jade-900">45%</span>
            </div>
            <h4 class="font-serif font-bold text-sm text-jade-800 mt-4 mb-1">天地合一 / Cosmos Harmony</h4>
            <p class="text-[11px] text-jade-500/80 leading-relaxed">四时变化，五行共鸣。天人造化，于细微之处寻天真之乐。</p>
          </div>

        </div>

        <!-- Info Column -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-4">
          <div class="inline-block p-1 border-b border-gold-400/30 pb-2 mb-2">
            <span class="font-calligraphy text-xl text-cinnabar-500">数理雅韵</span>
          </div>
          <h2 class="font-serif text-3xl font-semibold text-jade-900 tracking-wider">天工造物指数</h2>
          <p class="text-xs text-gold-500 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Aesthetics of Precision</p>
          
          <p class="text-xs text-jade-600 leading-relaxed mt-6">
            以古典比例设计而出的黄金平衡。我们将古人的太极双鱼图、宫廷度量衡、甚至古筝琴弦的震动弧度转化为优雅的数据视觉交互，在精密计算中再现千年的浪漫智慧。
          </p>

          <blockquote class="mt-6 border-l-2 border-gold-400 pl-4 py-2 italic text-xs text-jade-700 bg-white/20">
            “大音希声，大象无形。不言其极，其道大成。”
          </blockquote>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- JAVASCRIPT LOGIC & EXPERIENTIAL INTERACTION -->
  <script>
    // System Config & Global Variables
    const apiKey = ""; // Environment handles Key automatically at runtime
    let generatedAudioWav = null;
    let selectedAtmosphereTags = [];
    let currentSelectedStyle = "7"; // Default Seven-character (七言绝句)
    let currentInkColor = "#2c3539"; // Default Charcoal Black

    // Fallbacks & Safety constants
    const FALLBACK_POEMS = {
      '7': {
        poem: "清风细雨过竹林，\n孤舟影乱水波深。\n独饮清茗听远笛，\n月落平湖照古琴。",
        translation: "清凉的细雨穿过幽深的翠竹，孤独的小舟在深沉的水波中摇曳。独自品尝一盏温热的香茗静听远方的笛声，当月亮西沉在平静的湖面时，那皎洁的光芒恰好洒落在古琴之上。",
        english: "Cool winds and light rain drift through the bamboo woods,\nA lonely boat cast shadows on the deep water's waves.\nSipping pure tea alone, listening to the distant flute,\nAs the moon descends upon the calm lake, lighting up the old zither."
      },
      '5': {
        poem: "孤帆远山夕，\n清江竹影稀。\n月高风起落，\n寒客抱琴归。",
        translation: "孤独的船帆逐渐消失在落日余晖的高山中，清澈的江水两岸竹影已经渐渐稀疏。明月挂在天空，风忽起忽落，清寒的雅士怀抱着古琴踏上归家的旅程。",
        english: "A lonely sail melts into the sunset peaks,\nAlong the clear river, bamboo shadows grow thin.\nThe moon hangs high as the mountain breeze rises,\nA traveler carrying his zither returns in the autumn chill."
      }
    };

    // Initialize Canvas on Document Load
    window.onload = function() {
      initPetalCanvas();
      initInkCanvas();
      initAudioInteractions();
    };

    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 1. DRIFTING CHERRY BLOSSOM CANVASES SYSTEM
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    function initPetalCanvas() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('petalCanvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      let petals = [];

      function resizeCanvas() {
        canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
        canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      }
      resizeCanvas();
      window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);

      class Petal {
        constructor() {
          this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
          this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height - canvas.height;
          this.size = Math.random() * 8 + 4;
          this.speedY = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.8;
          this.speedX = Math.random() * 0.8 - 0.2;
          this.rotation = Math.random() * 360;
          this.rotationSpeed = Math.random() * 1.5 - 0.75;
          // Soft pink and white petals matching classical blossom aesthetics
          this.color = `rgba(${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 215}, ${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 110}, ${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 120}, ${Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.35})`;
        }

        update() {
          this.y += this.speedY;
          this.x += this.speedX;
          this.rotation += this.rotationSpeed;

          // If petal drifts off screen, reset it to the top
          if (this.y > canvas.height) {
            this.y = -10;
            this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
          }
          if (this.x > canvas.width || this.x < 0) {
            this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
          }
        }

        draw() {
          ctx.save();
          ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
          ctx.rotate((this.rotation * Math.PI) / 180);
          ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
          
          // Draw standard delicate cherry blossom petal leaf shape
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
          ctx.quadraticCurveTo(this.size * 1.5, -this.size * 0.5, this.size, this.size);
          ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-this.size * 0.5, this.size * 1.5, 0, 0);
          ctx.fill();
          
          ctx.restore();
        }
      }

      // Populate array with 35 drifting petals
      for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
        petals.push(new Petal());
      }

      function animateLoop() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        petals.forEach(p => {
          p.update();
          p.draw();
        });
        requestAnimationFrame(animateLoop);
      }
      animateLoop();
    }


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 2. INTERACTIVE INK SPLASH BOARD
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    function initInkCanvas() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('inkCanvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      let drawing = false;
      let inkSplots = [];

      // Scale canvas to match bounding box dimensions correctly
      function resizeInkCanvas() {
        const rect = canvas.parentNode.getBoundingClientRect();
        canvas.width = rect.width;
        canvas.height = 400; // Constrain height comfortably
        drawParchmentBase();
      }

      function drawParchmentBase() {
        // Soft gradient representing traditional raw silk / paper base
        ctx.fillStyle = "#fcfbf7";
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      }

      resizeInkCanvas();
      window.addEventListener('resize', resizeInkCanvas);

      // Splot representing an elegant water ink splot with fading bleed
      class InkSplot {
        constructor(x, y, radius, maxOpacity, color) {
          this.x = x;
          this.y = y;
          this.radius = radius;
          this.opacity = maxOpacity;
          this.color = color;
          this.bleedRadius = radius * 1.4;
        }

        draw() {
          if (this.opacity <= 0.01) return;
          
          ctx.save();
          // Complex radial watercolor bleed representation
          let grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(this.x, this.y, this.radius * 0.2, this.x, this.y, this.bleedRadius);
          
          // Custom color parsing
          let hex = this.color;
          let r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
          let g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
          let b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);

          grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${this.opacity})`);
          grad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${this.opacity * 0.4})`);
          grad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, 0)`);

          ctx.fillStyle = grad;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.bleedRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fill();
          ctx.restore();
        }

        decay() {
          // Slow organic decay to symbolize transient art
          this.opacity -= 0.003;
          this.bleedRadius += 0.15; // Soft bleed expansion
        }
      }

      function getMousePos(evt) {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        return {
          x: evt.clientX - rect.left,
          y: evt.clientY - rect.top
        };
      }

      // Handle standard drawing events
      function startDraw(e) {
        drawing = true;
        drawInk(e);
      }

      function stopDraw() {
        drawing = false;
      }

      function drawInk(e) {
        if (!drawing) return;
        const pos = getMousePos(e);
        
        // Grab values from sliders
        const opacityVal = parseFloat(document.getElementById('inkOpacityRange').value) / 100;
        const sizeVal = parseFloat(document.getElementById('brushSizeRange').value);
        
        // Create a new ink spot
        inkSplots.push(new InkSplot(pos.x, pos.y, sizeVal, opacityVal, currentSelectedStyleColor));
      }

      // Hook up both desktop mouse and touch interactions
      let currentSelectedStyleColor = currentInkColor;
      
      canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDraw);
      canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDraw);
      canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', stopDraw);
      canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', drawInk);

      canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
        startDraw(e.touches[0]);
        e.preventDefault();
      });
      canvas.addEventListener('touchend', stopDraw);
      canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
        drawInk(e.touches[0]);
        e.preventDefault();
      });

      // Simple animation loop for decaying ink washes
      function updateCanvasLoop() {
        drawParchmentBase();
        
        // Filter out decayed splots and draw the active ones
        inkSplots = inkSplots.filter(splot => splot.opacity > 0.01);
        inkSplots.forEach(splot => {
          splot.decay();
          splot.draw();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(updateCanvasLoop);
      }
      updateCanvasLoop();

      // Clear button hook
      document.getElementById('clearInkBtn').onclick = () => {
        inkSplots = [];
      };

      // Range sliders indicators
      const opInput = document.getElementById('inkOpacityRange');
      const opVal = document.getElementById('inkOpacityVal');
      opInput.oninput = () => { opVal.innerText = `${opInput.value}%`; };

      const sizeInput = document.getElementById('brushSizeRange');
      const sizeVal = document.getElementById('brushSizeVal');
      sizeInput.oninput = () => { sizeVal.innerText = `${sizeInput.value}px`; };

      // Setter helper
      window.setInkColor = (hex) => {
        currentSelectedStyleColor = hex;
        // Visual indicator styling
        document.querySelectorAll('[title*="Ink"]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.classList.remove('border-gold-400');
          btn.classList.add('border-gold-400/20');
        });
        event.target.classList.add('border-gold-400');
        event.target.classList.remove('border-gold-400/20');
      };
    }


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 3. SOOTHING AMBIENT SOUND GENERATOR
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    function initAudioInteractions() {
      const audioBtn = document.getElementById('zenAudioBtn');
      const flute = document.getElementById('ambientFlute');
      let audioCtx = null;
      let synthInterval = null;
      let isPlaying = false;

      // Traditional 5-note pentatonic scale frequencies (宮商角徵羽 - C Major Pentatonic)
      const pentatonicScale = [261.63, 293.66, 329.63, 392.00, 440.00, 523.25, 587.33, 659.25, 783.99, 880.00];

      function playGuzhengPluck() {
        if (!audioCtx) return;
        
        const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
        const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
        const delay = audioCtx.createDelay();
        const delayGain = audioCtx.createGain();

        // High quality physical modeling pluck approximation
        osc.type = 'triangle';
        
        // Grab random pentatonic frequency
        const freq = pentatonicScale[Math.floor(Math.random() * pentatonicScale.length)];
        osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);

        // Intricate Guzheng vibration pluck: rapid micro-pitch fluctuations (vibrato)
        osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
        osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(freq + (Math.random() * 8 - 4), audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);

        // Sharp pluck attack, long slow organic decay
        gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, audioCtx.currentTime);
        gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.02);
        gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 2.5);

        // Feedback Echo (simulating grand courtyard pavilion resonance)
        delay.delayTime.value = 0.45;
        delayGain.gain.value = 0.35;

        // Connections
        osc.connect(gainNode);
        gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        
        // Feed pluck into echo delay
        gainNode.connect(delay);
        delay.connect(delayGain);
        delayGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        // Delay loop
        delayGain.connect(delay);

        osc.start();
        osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 3);
      }

      function toggleZenAmbience() {
        if (!audioCtx) {
          audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        }

        if (isPlaying) {
          // Pause Audio
          flute.pause();
          clearInterval(synthInterval);
          audioBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-wind text-sm"></i>';
          audioBtn.classList.remove('bg-cinnabar-500', 'text-white');
          isPlaying = false;
        } else {
          // Play Audio
          if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
            audioCtx.resume();
          }
          flute.play().catch(e => console.log("Interactivity audio unlocked on gesture"));
          
          // Start the procedural Guzheng random pluck generator
          synthInterval = setInterval(() => {
            // Random plucks every few seconds representing sporadic strings drifting in wind
            if (Math.random() > 0.4) {
              playGuzhengPluck();
              // Occasional double pluck for harmony
              if (Math.random() > 0.7) {
                setTimeout(playGuzhengPluck, 150);
              }
            }
          }, 1800);

          audioBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-music text-sm animate-spin" style="animation-duration: 8s;"></i>';
          audioBtn.classList.add('bg-cinnabar-500', 'text-white');
          isPlaying = true;
        }
      }

      audioBtn.onclick = toggleZenAmbience;
    }


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 4. AI INK MUSE COMPOSER (GEMINI INTEGRATION)
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    
    // Toggle Poetry Style (Seven character or Five character)
    window.setPoetryStyle = (style) => {
      currentSelectedStyle = style;
      const btn7 = document.getElementById('styleBtn7');
      const btn5 = document.getElementById('styleBtn5');
      if (style === '7') {
        btn7.className = "px-4 py-2.5 bg-jade-500 text-white rounded-xs text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider transition-colors border border-jade-500";
        btn5.className = "px-4 py-2.5 bg-white text-jade-700 hover:bg-jade-50 rounded-xs text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider transition-colors border border-jade-500/20";
      } else {
        btn5.className = "px-4 py-2.5 bg-jade-500 text-white rounded-xs text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider transition-colors border border-jade-500";
        btn7.className = "px-4 py-2.5 bg-white text-jade-700 hover:bg-jade-50 rounded-xs text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider transition-colors border border-jade-500/20";
      }
    };

    // Toggle Atmosphere tag helpers
    window.addAtmosphereTag = (tag) => {
      const input = document.getElementById('poeticTheme');
      let currentVal = input.value.trim();
      if (currentVal) {
        input.value = `${currentVal}, ${tag}`;
      } else {
        input.value = tag;
      }
      input.focus();
    };

    // Gemini API Request & Formatting Orchestration
    document.getElementById('generatePoemBtn').onclick = async () => {
      const themeVal = document.getElementById('poeticTheme').value.trim() || "江南烟雨竹林";
      const btn = document.getElementById('generatePoemBtn');
      const loader = document.getElementById('loadingText');
      const output = document.getElementById('poemOutput');

      // Show loader state
      btn.disabled = true;
      loader.classList.remove('hidden');

      // Construct system instructions and prompts to prompt structured response matching the UI needs
      const systemPrompt = `You are a legendary ancient Chinese Zen poet. Your task is to compose a beautiful, rhythmically perfect Classical Chinese Poem (Jueju 绝句) based on the user's requested theme. You must follow the exact structure:
      If style is 7: 4 lines of exactly 7 characters each.
      If style is 5: 4 lines of exactly 5 characters each.

      You must return the response in strict JSON format. No extra markdown explanation around the JSON block.
      Format:
      {
        "poemLines": ["Line 1 with punctuation", "Line 2 with punctuation", "Line 3 with punctuation", "Line 4 with punctuation"],
        "translation": "Deep elegant poetic modern Chinese translation...",
        "english": "Beautiful poetic English translation..."
      }`;

      const userQuery = `Compose a ${currentSelectedStyle === '7' ? 'Seven-character Jueju (七言绝句)' : 'Five-character Jueju (五言绝句)'} classical poem based on the theme: "${themeVal}". Focus heavily on traditional ink wash painterly aesthetics.`;

      try {
        let resultData = null;
        
        if (apiKey) {
          // Perform live API call to Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview with structured output configuration
          const response = await fetchWithRetry(`https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              contents: [{ parts: [{ text: userQuery }] }],
              systemInstruction: { parts: [{ text: systemPrompt }] },
              generationConfig: {
                responseMimeType: "application/json",
                responseSchema: {
                  type: "OBJECT",
                  properties: {
                    poemLines: { type: "ARRAY", items: { type: "STRING" } },
                    translation: { type: "STRING" },
                    english: { type: "STRING" }
                  },
                  required: ["poemLines", "translation", "english"]
                }
              }
            })
          });

          const data = await response.json();
          const jsonText = data.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text;
          resultData = JSON.parse(jsonText);
        } else {
          // Graceful simulated delay to match physical model loading state + local high-fidelity fallback
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));
          resultData = {
            poemLines: FALLBACK_POEMS[currentSelectedStyle].poem.split('\n'),
            translation: FALLBACK_POEMS[currentSelectedStyle].translation,
            english: FALLBACK_POEMS[currentSelectedStyle].english
          };
        }

        // Render Generated outputs beautifully in vertical layout
        renderVerticalPoem(resultData.poemLines);
        document.getElementById('modernTranslation').innerText = resultData.translation;
        document.getElementById('englishTranslation').innerText = resultData.english;

        // Reveal container smoothly
        output.classList.remove('hidden');
        output.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });

        // Set up the speech generator payload
        window.currentPoemText = resultData.poemLines.join(' ');

      } catch (err) {
        console.error("API Call error:", err);
        // Fallback UI to prevent user frustration
        const fallback = FALLBACK_POEMS[currentSelectedStyle];
        renderVerticalPoem(fallback.poem.split('\n'));
        document.getElementById('modernTranslation').innerText = fallback.translation;
        document.getElementById('englishTranslation').innerText = fallback.english;
        output.classList.remove('hidden');
        output.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
      } finally {
        btn.disabled = false;
        loader.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    };

    // Exponential Backoff Fetch Helper
    async function fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries = 5, delay = 1000) {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(url, options);
        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP status ${response.status}`);
        return response;
      } catch (err) {
        if (retries > 0) {
          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
          return fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries - 1, delay * 2);
        }
        throw err;
      }
    }

    // Traditional vertical typesetting layout helper
    function renderVerticalPoem(lines) {
      const container = document.getElementById('verticalPoemContainer');
      container.innerHTML = ''; // Reset

      // Render lines right-to-left as per ancient scrolls
      for (let i = lines.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const lineText = lines[i].replace(/[，。？！、]/g, '').trim();
        const punctuation = lines[i].match(/[，。？！、]/)?.[0] || '';
        
        const column = document.createElement('div');
        column.className = 'vertical-text flex flex-col items-center gap-1.5 border-l border-dashed border-jade-500/10 pl-6 last:border-l-0';
        
        // Output each character with elegant calligraphy font
        for (let char of lineText) {
          const charSpan = document.createElement('span');
          charSpan.className = 'hover:text-cinnabar-500 transition-colors duration-200 cursor-default';
          charSpan.innerText = char;
          column.appendChild(charSpan);
        }

        // Add subtle punctuation space/mark below if exists
        if (punctuation) {
          const puncSpan = document.createElement('span');
          puncSpan.className = 'text-base text-cinnabar-500/70 mt-2 font-bold';
          puncSpan.innerText = punctuation;
          column.appendChild(puncSpan);
        }

        container.appendChild(column);
      }
    }


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 5. HIGH-QUALITY GEMINI TTS ORCHESTRATION
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    document.getElementById('ttsPlayBtn').onclick = async () => {
      const playBtn = document.getElementById('ttsPlayBtn');
      const textToSpeak = window.currentPoemText || "清风细雨过竹林，孤舟影乱水波深。";
      
      playBtn.disabled = true;
      playBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin mr-2"></i> 奏乐诵读中...';

      // Advanced text-to-speech utilizing gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts with "Leda" (serene voice style)
      const payload = {
        contents: [{ parts: [{ text: `Say solemnly, in a slow, peaceful, and extremely traditional poetic tempo: ${textToSpeak}` }] }],
        generationConfig: {
          responseModalities: ["AUDIO"],
          speechConfig: {
            voiceConfig: {
              prebuiltVoiceConfig: {
                voiceName: "Leda" // Ideal peaceful voice for reading Chinese poems
              }
            }
          }
        },
        model: "gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts"
      };

      try {
        if (!apiKey) {
          // Play simulated zither chime if no key is present to guarantee aesthetic feedback
          playProceduralTraditionalBell();
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));
          alert("提示: 在没有API密钥的环境中，已播放内置琴磬之音模拟。");
        } else {
          const response = await fetchWithRetry(`https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload)
          });

          const result = await response.json();
          const base64Audio = result.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.find(p => p.inlineData)?.inlineData?.data;
          
          if (base64Audio) {
            // Transform raw PCM binary stream from Gemini TTS into high quality browser playable WAV
            const wavBuffer = pcmToWav(base64Audio, 24000); // Default Gemini TTS sample rate is 24KHz
            const blob = new Blob([wavBuffer], { type: 'audio/wav' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const audio = new Audio(url);
            audio.play();
          }
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("TTS generation error:", err);
        playProceduralTraditionalBell();
      } finally {
        playBtn.disabled = false;
        playBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-play mr-2"></i> 开启朗诵 / Listen Now';
      }
    };

    // Client-side quick helper function to synthesize a zen bowl chime via Web Audio API
    function playProceduralTraditionalBell() {
      const actx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
      const osc = actx.createOscillator();
      const gain = actx.createGain();
      
      osc.type = 'sine';
      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(440, actx.currentTime); // Standard Zen chime frequency
      
      // Decay profile
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, actx.currentTime);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, actx.currentTime + 3);

      osc.connect(gain);
      gain.connect(actx.destination);
      osc.start();
      osc.stop(actx.currentTime + 3);
    }

    // PCM-to-WAV ArrayBuffer encoder utility function
    function pcmToWav(base64Data, sampleRate) {
      const byteCharacters = atob(base64Data);
      const byteNumbers = new Array(byteCharacters.length);
      for (let i = 0; i < byteCharacters.length; i++) {
        byteNumbers[i] = byteCharacters.charCodeAt(i);
      }
      const byteArray = new Uint8Array(byteNumbers);
      const pcmBuffer = new Int16Array(byteArray.buffer);

      const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(44 + pcmBuffer.length * 2);
      const view = new DataView(buffer);

      // RIFF identifier
      writeString(view, 0, 'RIFF');
      // File length
      view.setUint32(4, 36 + pcmBuffer.length * 2, true);
      // RIFF type
      writeString(view, 8, 'WAVE');
      // Format chunk identifier
      writeString(view, 12, 'fmt ');
      // Format chunk length
      view.setUint32(16, 16, true);
      // Sample format (raw PCM)
      view.setUint16(20, 1, true);
      // Channel count (1 channel)
      view.setUint16(22, 1, true);
      // Sample rate
      view.setUint32(24, sampleRate, true);
      // Byte rate (sample rate * block align)
      view.setUint32(28, sampleRate * 2, true);
      // Block align (channel count * bytes per sample)
      view.setUint16(32, 2, true);
      // Bits per sample
      view.setUint16(34, 16, true);
      // Data chunk identifier
      writeString(view, 36, 'data');
      // Chunk length
      view.setUint32(40, pcmBuffer.length * 2, true);

      // Write PCM data
      let offset = 44;
      for (let i = 0; i < pcmBuffer.length; i++, offset += 2) {
        view.setInt16(offset, pcmBuffer[i], true);
      }

      return buffer;
    }

    function writeString(view, offset, string) {
      for (let i = 0; i < string.length; i++) {
        view.setUint8(offset + i, string.charCodeAt(i));
      }
    }


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 6. DRAGGABLE SCROLL COMPONENT CONTROLLER
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    const scrollContainer = document.getElementById('scrollContainer');
    let isDown = false;
    let startX;
    let scrollLeft;

    // Side navigation button click offsets
    document.getElementById('scrollLeftBtn').onclick = () => {
      scrollContainer.scrollBy({ left: -320, behavior: 'smooth' });
    };
    document.getElementById('scrollRightBtn').onclick = () => {
      scrollContainer.scrollBy({ left: 320, behavior: 'smooth' });
    };

    // Grab-to-drag mouse scroll mechanics
    scrollContainer.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
      isDown = true;
      startX = e.pageX - scrollContainer.offsetLeft;
      scrollLeft = scrollContainer.scrollLeft;
    });
    scrollContainer.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { isDown = false; });
    scrollContainer.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { isDown = false; });
    scrollContainer.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      if(!isDown) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      const x = e.pageX - scrollContainer.offsetLeft;
      const walk = (x - startX) * 1.5; // Drag sensitivity
      scrollContainer.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
    });


    /* -------------------------------------------
     * 7. SUBSCRIPTION SUCCESS POPUP
     * ------------------------------------------- */
    window.handleSubscribe = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      document.getElementById('subscribeSuccess').classList.remove('hidden');
      e.target.reset();
    };
  </script>
</body>
</html>

                      key={lash.id}
                      onClick={() => { setCustomEyelashLength(lash.id); playSoftClick(); }}
                      className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border text-left transition-all duration-300 ${customEyelashLength === lash.id ? 'border-[#D35230] bg-[#D35230]/5 shadow-sm' : 'border-[#E9DFCE] hover:border-[#C3B091] bg-white'}`}
                    >
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs font-bold text-[#252825]">{lash.name}</p>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-[10px] text-[#8A7F71] mt-1">{lash.desc}</p>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </main>
      )}

      {/* TAB CONTENT: THE RITUAL / BOOKING (预约雅席) */}
      {activeTab === 'booking' && (
        <main className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 animate-fadeIn text-left">
          
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-start">
            
            {/* Left: Interactive Form */}
            <div className="lg:col-span-7 bg-white p-8 md:p-12 rounded-[40px] border border-[#E9DFCE] shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden">
              
              {/* Subtle design element */}
              <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 w-32 h-32 bg-[#D35230]/5 rounded-bl-full pointer-events-none"></div>

              <div className="mb-8">
                <span className="font-sans-clean text-xs text-[#D35230] font-bold tracking-[0.2em] block mb-2 uppercase">RESERVATION CENTER</span>
                <h1 className="font-serif-zh text-3xl md:text-4xl font-light text-[#252825] tracking-widest">
                  雅席预定
                </h1>
                <p className="font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#8A7F71] mt-2 leading-relaxed">
                  请填写预约意愿，我们将在两小时内由定制美学顾问致电，为您确认手艺人档期与进店礼遇。
                </p>
              </div>

              {isBooked ? (
                <div className="bg-[#EFEBE4]/60 border border-[#D35230]/20 p-8 rounded-3xl text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 animate-scaleIn">
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-[#D35230] text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-8 h-8" />
                  </div>
                  <h3 className="font-serif-zh text-2xl font-bold text-[#252825] mb-4">定制预约申请已提交</h3>
                  <p className="font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] leading-relaxed max-w-md">
                    {t.successMsg}
                  </p>
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => { setIsBooked(false); playSoftClick(); }}
                    className="mt-8 bg-[#252825] text-white px-8 py-3.5 rounded-full font-sans-clean text-xs font-semibold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                  >
                    返回主页
                  </button>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <form 
                  onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsBooked(true); playSoftClick(); }}
                  className="flex flex-col gap-6"
                >
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] mb-2 font-semibold">雅客贵姓 (Name)</label>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <User className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-[#8A7F71]" />
                        <input 
                          type="text" 
                          required
                          value={bookingName}
                          onChange={(e) => setBookingName(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="如何称呼您" 
                          className="w-full bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E9DFCE] rounded-xl py-3.5 pl-12 pr-4 text-[#252825] font-serif-zh text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="block font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] mb-2 font-semibold">联络电话 (Phone)</label>
                      <div className="relative">
                        <Phone className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-[#8A7F71]" />
                        <input 
                          type="tel" 
                          required
                          value={bookingPhone}
                          onChange={(e) => setBookingPhone(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="以便顾问致电" 
                          className="w-full bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E9DFCE] rounded-xl py-3.5 pl-12 pr-4 text-[#252825] font-serif-zh text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div>
                    <label className="block font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] mb-2 font-semibold">选定定制项目 (Service)</label>
                    <input 
                      type="text" 
                      value={bookingService}
                      onChange={(e) => setBookingService(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="美甲定制 / 睫毛艺术项目" 
                      className="w-full bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E9DFCE] rounded-xl py-3.5 px-4 text-[#252825] font-serif-zh text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                    />
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] mb-2 font-semibold">期望日期 (Date)</label>
                      <input 
                        type="date" 
                        required
                        value={bookingDate}
                        onChange={(e) => setBookingDate(e.target.value)}
                        className="w-full bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E9DFCE] rounded-xl py-3.5 px-4 text-[#252825] font-serif-zh text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="block font-serif-zh text-sm text-[#5E5346] mb-2 font-semibold">期望时段 (Time)</label>
                      <input 
                        type="time" 
                        required
                        value={bookingTime}
                        onChange={(e) => setBookingTime(e.target.value)}
                        className="w-full bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#E9DFCE] rounded-xl py-3.5 px-4 text-[#252825] font-serif-zh text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D35230] transition-colors"
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex gap-3 items-start mt-2">
                    <input type="checkbox" required id="privacy" className="mt-1 accent-[#D35230]" />
                    <label htmlFor="privacy" className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#8A7F71] leading-relaxed cursor-pointer">
                      我同意一客一间专属定制服务规则，若行程有变将提前3小时告知顾问。
                    </label>
                  </div>

                  <button 
                    type="submit" 
                    className="w-full bg-[#252825] hover:bg-[#D35230] text-[#F7F5F0] py-4 rounded-xl font-sans-clean text-xs font-semibold tracking-widest transition-colors duration-500 mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                  >
                    <span>提交预约雅席申请</span>
                    <Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </form>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Right: Salon Space Details */}
            <div className="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col gap-8">
              {/* Salon info card */}
              <div className="bg-[#EFEBE4] p-8 rounded-[32px] border border-[#E9DFCE]">
                <h3 className="font-serif-zh text-xl font-bold text-[#252825] tracking-widest mb-6 border-b border-black/10 pb-4">
                  {t.contactUs}
                </h3>

                <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-[#D35230] mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-sm font-semibold text-[#252825]">雅舍地址 · Beijing/Shanghai</p>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#5E5346] mt-1 leading-relaxed">北京市东城区安定门内大街12号 (近国子监院落)</p>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#5E5346] leading-relaxed">上海市徐汇区安福路88号三层禅意阁</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-[#D35230] mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-sm font-semibold text-[#252825]">静修营业时间</p>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#5E5346] mt-1">周一至周日 10:00 - 22:00 (仅接待预约客人)</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <Award className="w-5 h-5 text-[#D35230] mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-sm font-semibold text-[#252825]">进店专属礼遇</p>
                      <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#5E5346] mt-1 leading-relaxed">预约到店客均享有精选九曲红梅盖碗茶、中式手作桃酥糕点一份。</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Serene Zen Aesthetic Visual Quote Block */}
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-b from-[#E2EBE5] to-[#D0DFD4] p-8 rounded-[32px] border border-[#b5c7ba] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between aspect-[4/3]">
                {/* Red stamp inside visual */}
                <div className="absolute right-6 top-6 w-9 h-9 bg-[#D35230] flex items-center justify-center rounded-[2px]">
                  <span className="text-white text-xs font-serif-zh font-bold">雅</span>
                </div>
                
                <p className="font-serif-zh text-lg text-[#253D35] italic leading-relaxed font-medium">
                  “一呼一吸，在极简的留白中，寻回内心的安静力量。”
                </p>

                <div className="flex justify-between items-end border-t border-black/5 pt-4">
                  <span className="font-serif-en text-sm italic text-[#4F7C6F]">Oriental Zen Sanctuary</span>
                  <span className="font-sans-clean text-[9px] text-[#4F7C6F] tracking-widest font-semibold">EST. 2026</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </main>
      )}

      {/* FOOTER SECTION */}
      <footer className="relative z-10 bg-[#252825] text-[#EFEBE4] py-16 mt-24 border-t border-[#4A453F]">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12 text-left">
          
          <div className="md:col-span-2 flex flex-col items-start gap-4">
            <span className="font-serif-en text-3xl font-light tracking-wide">Fingertip Art</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className="font-serif-zh text-sm tracking-widest text-[#C3B091]">{t.brand}</span>
              <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#D35230]"></div>
              <span className="font-sans-clean text-[9px] text-[#8A7F71] uppercase tracking-widest">Atelier</span>
            </div>
            <p className="font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#8A7F71] max-w-sm leading-relaxed mt-2">
              以指尖承载悠悠宋风雅韵。在快节奏的世界里，为您开辟一处悠游山水的毫厘乐土。
            </p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h4 className="font-serif-zh text-sm font-bold text-[#C3B091] tracking-widest mb-4">探索项目</h4>
            <ul className="flex flex-col gap-3 font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#8A7F71]">
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('gallery'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">雨过天青天青美甲</button></li>
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('gallery'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">泥金微芒复古美甲</button></li>
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('gallery'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">落雨听风中式美睫</button></li>
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('gallery'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">惊鸿羽睫高定系列</button></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h4 className="font-serif-zh text-sm font-bold text-[#C3B091] tracking-widest mb-4">赏析指尖</h4>
            <ul className="flex flex-col gap-3 font-serif-zh text-xs text-[#8A7F71]">
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('customizer'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">在线搭配工作坊</button></li>
              <li><button onClick={() => { setActiveTab('booking'); playSoftClick(); }} className="hover:text-white transition-colors">预约单客雅座</button></li>
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">品牌美学专栏</a></li>
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">合作共创计划</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Footnotes */}
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-[#4A453F] flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-xs text-[#8A7F71]">
          <span className="font-serif-zh">© 2026 Fingertip Art 东方美学. All Rights Reserved.</span>
          <div className="flex gap-6 font-sans-clean text-[10px] tracking-widest uppercase">
            <a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Privacy Policy</a>
            <a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Terms of Ritual</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  );
}

                        <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Beauty Innovation Awards 2026

                        <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <div class="p-2 rounded-lg bg-brand-olive/20 text-brand-lightSage">
                                <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-cream tracking-wider uppercase">Cellular Activation</h4>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-cream/60 mt-1 leading-normal">Formulated to stimulate deeply nested active skin renewal pathways.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

    <script>
        // Initialize Lucide Icons

                goal: null,
                sensitivity: null,
                age: null
            },
            currentReviewIndex: 0,
            activeHotspot: 1
        };

        // Testimonial Data

                text: '"Never did I expect botanical active science to yield such rapid results. The deep micro-hydration leaves my skin feeling incredibly bouncy and resilient. This represents actual aesthetic mastery."',
                author: "Dr. Marcus Vance",
                role: "Consultant Dermatologist",
                avatar: "MV"
            },
            {
                text: '"Clinical transparency is rare. Knowing GlowUp uses 99.4% biodynamic extracts coupled with stable peptides gives me the utmost confidence. It is a masterpiece bottle."',
                author: "Sophia Laurent",
                role: "Aesthetician & Influencer",
                avatar: "SL"
            }
        ];

        // Hotspots Detailed Text
        const hotspotDetails = {
            1: {
                title: "Active Cell Recovery Complex",
                desc: "Harnessing isolated organic cells designed to fortify cellular matrices and trigger self-repair mechanisms up to 74% faster than standard hydration complexes."
            },
            2: {
                title: "Antioxidant Defense Matrix",
                desc: "A powerful combination of clinical green tea phenols and pomegranate phytosomes that acts as an invisible shield against urban micro-dust and daily UV degradation."
            },
            3: {
                title: "Intense Micro-Hydration",
                desc: "Utilizing multiple weights of pure bio-synthetic hyaluronic acid. It locks down moisture immediately, restoring plumpness to deep tissue layers."
            }
        };

        // Header dynamic transition on scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const header = document.getElementById('main-header');
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                header.classList.add('bg-brand-dark/95', 'shadow-lg', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'border-b', 'border-white/5');
            } else {
                header.classList.remove('bg-brand-dark/95', 'shadow-lg', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'border-b', 'border-white/5');
            }
        });

        // 1. Interactive Cell Matrix generator for Slide 2 background
        function generateCells() {
            const container = document.getElementById('cellular-ambient-container');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            const cellCount = 12;
            for (let i = 0; i < cellCount; i++) {
                const cell = document.createElement('div');
                const size = Math.random() * 40 + 20;
                cell.className = 'absolute bg-brand-lightSage/5 border border-brand-lightSage/20 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-out animate-pulse';
                cell.style.width = `${size}px`;
                cell.style.height = `${size}px`;
                cell.style.left = `${Math.random() * 90}%`;
                cell.style.top = `${Math.random() * 90}%`;
                cell.style.transform = `scale(${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.8})`;
                container.appendChild(cell);
            }
        }
        window.onload = function() {
            generateCells();
            // Start rotation cycles
            setInterval(generateCells, 12000);
        };

        function regenerateCells() {
            showToast("Bio-Synthesis Matrix Reset Successfully");
            generateCells();
        }

        // 2. Interactive Jar Benefit Revealer
        function revealJarBenefit() {
            const benefits = [
                "Intense Moisture replenishment detected.",
                "Clinical elasticity improvement: +34% verified.",
                "Earthy natural antioxidants activated.",
                "99.4% biodynamic extract shield enabled."
            ];
            const randomBenefit = benefits[Math.floor(Math.random() * benefits.length)];
            showToast(randomBenefit);
        }

        // 3. Hotspot Controller
        function focusHotspot(nodeId) {
            state.activeHotspot = nodeId;
            
            // Visual indicators update
            for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
                const el = document.getElementById(`node-${i}`);
                if (i === nodeId) {
                    el.classList.add('border-l-4', 'border-brand-lightSage');
                    el.classList.remove('border-l-0');
                } else {
                    el.classList.remove('border-l-4', 'border-brand-lightSage');
                }
            }

            // Update details
            document.getElementById('detail-title').innerText = hotspotDetails[nodeId].title;
            document.getElementById('detail-desc').innerText = hotspotDetails[nodeId].desc;
        }

        // 4. Testimonials carousel switcher
        function updateReview() {
            const r = reviews[state.currentReviewIndex];
            const textEl = document.getElementById('review-text');
            const authorEl = document.getElementById('review-author');
            const roleEl = document.getElementById('review-role');
            const avatarEl = document.getElementById('review-avatar');

            // Apply quick fade transitions
            textEl.classList.add('opacity-0');
            setTimeout(() => {
                textEl.innerText = r.text;
                authorEl.innerText = r.author;
                roleEl.innerText = r.role;
                avatarEl.innerText = r.avatar;
                textEl.classList.remove('opacity-0');
            }, 200);
        }

        function prevReview() {
            state.currentReviewIndex = (state.currentReviewIndex - 1 + reviews.length) % reviews.length;
            updateReview();
        }

        function nextReview() {
            state.currentReviewIndex = (state.currentReviewIndex + 1) % reviews.length;
            updateReview();
        }

        // 5. Diagnostics Wizard Logic
        function setDiagValue(key, value, currentStep) {
            state.diagnostics[key] = value;
            
            // Advance wizard steps
            document.getElementById(`diag-step-${currentStep}`).classList.add('hidden');
            const nextStep = currentStep + 1;
            
            const progressBar = document.getElementById('diag-progress');
            if (currentStep < 3) {
                const nextStepEl = document.getElementById(`diag-step-${nextStep}`);
                nextStepEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                progressBar.style.width = `${(nextStep / 3) * 100}%`;
            } else {
                // Show Result Screen
                document.getElementById('diag-result').classList.remove('hidden');
                progressBar.style.width = '100%';
                calculateDiagnosisResult();
            }
        }

        function calculateDiagnosisResult() {
            const goal = state.diagnostics.goal;
            const sensitivity = state.diagnostics.sensitivity;
            
            let formulaName = "GlowUp Balanced Synergy Matrix";
            let formulaDesc = "Custom balanced organic formulation designed to stabilize sensitive zones and supply foundational cellular hydration.";

            if (goal === 'hydrate') {
                formulaName = "GlowUp Hydra-Symmetry Essence";
                formulaDesc = "Rich in molecular weight hyaluronic acids and cold-pressed bio-lipids. Specifically chosen to eradicate tight, parched skin areas.";
            } else if (goal === 'firm') {
                formulaName = "GlowUp Peptide Firming Complex";
                formulaDesc = "Deeply concentrated cell recovery serum that targets slackened elastin matrices, promoting maximum tension and contour radiance.";
            } else if (goal === 'bright') {
                formulaName = "GlowUp Active Radiance Infusion";
                formulaDesc = "Infused with organic pomegranate phytosomes and stable vitamin C precursors to lift hyperpigmentation and reveal instant skin glow.";
            }

            if (sensitivity === 'reactive') {
                formulaName += " (Ultra-Gentle Edition)";
                formulaDesc += " Modified with localized green tea extracts and allergen barriers to ensure absolute zero redness reactions.";
            }

            document.getElementById('result-formula-name').innerText = formulaName;
            document.getElementById('result-formula-desc').innerText = formulaDesc;
        }

        function resetDiag() {
            state.diagnostics = { goal: null, sensitivity: null, age: null };
            document.getElementById('diag-result').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('diag-step-1').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('diag-progress').style.width = '33.33%';
        }

        // 6. Interactive Cart Logic
        function toggleCartModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('cart-modal');
            modal.classList.toggle('hidden');
            modal.classList.toggle('translate-x-full');
        }

        function addPrescriptionToCart() {
            const name = document.getElementById('result-formula-name').innerText;
            const item = {
                id: Date.now(),
                name: name,
                price: 89.00,
                type: 'Custom Diagnosis Prescription'
            };
            state.cart.push(item);
            updateCartUI();
            toggleCartModal();
            showToast("Custom Jar added successfully!");
        }

        function updateCartUI() {
            const container = document.getElementById('cart-items-container');
            const emptyState = document.getElementById('cart-empty-state');
            const totalPriceEl = document.getElementById('cart-total-price');

            if (state.cart.length === 0) {
                emptyState.classList.remove('hidden');
                container.innerHTML = '';
                totalPriceEl.innerText = '$0.00';
                return;
            }

            emptyState.classList.add('hidden');
            container.innerHTML = state.cart.map(item => `
                <div class="glassmorphism rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
                    <div class="flex-1">
                        <h4 class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-brand-cream tracking-wider">${item.name}</h4>
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-lightSage mt-1">${item.type}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <span class="text-sm font-bold text-brand-cream">$${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        <button onclick="removeCartItem(${item.id})" class="block text-[10px] text-red-400 hover:underline mt-1">Remove</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            const total = state.cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price, 0);
            totalPriceEl.innerText = `$${total.toFixed(2)}`;
        }

        function removeCartItem(itemId) {
            state.cart = state.cart.filter(item => item.id !== itemId);
            updateCartUI();
            showToast("Removed from ritual bag.");
        }

        function simulateCheckout() {
            if (state.cart.length === 0) {
                showToast("Your beauty bag is empty.");
                return;
            }
            showToast("Simulating secure transaction...");
            setTimeout(() => {
                state.cart = [];
                updateCartUI();
                toggleCartModal();
                showToast("Order Placed! Thank you for choosing GlowUp.");
            }, 1500);
        }

        // 7. Toast Notification Trigger
        function showToast(message) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('custom-toast');
            const toastMsg = document.getElementById('toast-message');
            toastMsg.innerText = message;
            
            toast.classList.remove('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
            toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');

            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.add('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
                toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
            }, 4000);
        }

        // 8. Newsletter form handling
        function handleSubscribe(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const msg = document.getElementById('subscribe-message');
            msg.innerText = "Processing organic newsletter subscription...";
            msg.classList.remove('hidden');

            setTimeout(() => {
                msg.innerText = "Subscription confirmed! Welcome to the GlowUp Circle.";
                showToast("Welcome to the GlowUp Circle!");
            }, 1000);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>

  <script>
    // Smooth catalog scrolling 
    function scrollCatalog(direction) {
      const container = document.getElementById('catalog-container');
      const scrollAmount = 360; 
      container.scrollBy({
        left: direction * scrollAmount,
        behavior: 'smooth'
      });
    }

    // Toggle dynamic mobile preview frames matching the right side of the uploaded image
    function switchView(view) {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('main-canvas');
      const btnDesktop = document.getElementById('btn-desktop');
      const btnMobile = document.getElementById('btn-mobile');
      
      if (view === 'mobile') {
        canvas.style.maxWidth = '400px';
        canvas.style.margin = '0 auto';
        btnMobile.classList.add('bg-white', 'text-brand-navy', 'font-bold');
        btnMobile.classList.remove('text-white');
        btnDesktop.classList.remove('bg-white', 'text-brand-navy', 'font-bold');
        btnDesktop.classList.add('text-white');
      } else {
        canvas.style.maxWidth = '100%';
        canvas.style.margin = '0';
        btnDesktop.classList.add('bg-white', 'text-brand-navy', 'font-bold');
        btnDesktop.classList.remove('text-white');
        btnMobile.classList.remove('bg-white', 'text-brand-navy', 'font-bold');
        btnMobile.classList.add('text-white');
      }
    }

    // Mobile navigation menu toggle
    function toggleMobileMenu() {
      const menu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
      if (menu.classList.contains('hidden')) {
        menu.classList.remove('hidden');
      } else {
        menu.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    }

    // High fidelity feedback loop on form submission (prevents default iframe alerts)
    function handleFormSubmit(event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      const status = document.getElementById('formStatus');
      
      status.classList.remove('hidden', 'bg-rose-500/15', 'text-rose-400', 'bg-emerald-500/15', 'text-emerald-400');
      status.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin mr-2"></i> Отправка вашей заявки...';
      status.classList.add('block', 'bg-white/10', 'text-white');
      
      // Simulate API network wait
      setTimeout(() => {
        status.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle mr-2 text-emerald-400"></i> Спасибо! Ваша заявка принята. Наш эксперт свяжется с вами в течение 10 минут.';
        status.classList.remove('bg-white/10', 'text-white');
        status.classList.add('bg-emerald-500/15', 'text-emerald-400');
        document.getElementById('contactForm').reset();
      }, 1500);
    }
  </script>
</body>

    <script>
        // Custom interactive ambient lighting mechanism
        const glowBtn = document.getElementById('glow-toggle-btn');
        const glowIndicator = document.getElementById('glow-indicator');
        const glowText = document.getElementById('glow-text');
        const ambientGlow = document.getElementById('ambient-glow');
        const heroCard = document.getElementById('hero-card');
        const body = document.body;

        let isDuskMode = false;

        glowBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isDuskMode = !isDuskMode;
            if (isDuskMode) {
                // Change lighting state to twilight
                body.classList.add('twilight-mode');
                heroCard.classList.remove('from-brand-tealLight', 'to-[#c3e3e7]');
                heroCard.classList.add('from-[#1a3d49]', 'to-[#0f232b]');
                ambientGlow.classList.remove('opacity-0');
                ambientGlow.classList.add('opacity-40');
                glowIndicator.classList.remove('bg-yellow-400');
                glowIndicator.classList.add('bg-blue-400');
                glowText.textContent = "DAYLIGHT MODE";
                showCustomAlert("Mood Changed", "Switched to Twilight Mode. Feel the ambient glow change!");
            } else {
                // Change lighting state back to daylight
                body.classList.remove('twilight-mode');
                heroCard.classList.add('from-brand-tealLight', 'to-[#c3e3e7]');
                heroCard.classList.remove('from-[#1a3d49]', 'to-[#0f232b]');
                ambientGlow.classList.remove('opacity-40');
                ambientGlow.classList.add('opacity-0');
                glowIndicator.classList.remove('bg-blue-400');
                glowIndicator.classList.add('bg-yellow-400');
                glowText.textContent = "SERENE DUSK";
                showCustomAlert("Mood Changed", "Switched to natural Daylight. Crisp, serene, and clear.");
            }
        });

        // Chair customizer interactivity logic
        function changeChairColor(colorName, backdropColor, imageUrl) {
            const chairImg = document.getElementById('chair-image');
            const backdrop = document.getElementById('chair-backdrop');
            
            // Fade out
            chairImg.style.opacity = '0.3';
            chairImg.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                chairImg.src = imageUrl;
                backdrop.style.backgroundColor = backdropColor;
                
                // Fade in
                chairImg.style.opacity = '1';
                chairImg.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)';
                
                // Adjust active state of swatch buttons
                const swatches = document.querySelectorAll('.swatch-btn');
                swatches.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-brand-tealDark'));
                event.target.classList.add('border-brand-tealDark');
                
                showCustomAlert("Customization Applied", `Chose the serene ${colorName} colorway.`);
            }, 300);
        }

        // Custom alerts instead of basic browser window.alert
        function showCustomAlert(title, message) {
            const banner = document.getElementById('alert-banner');
            const alertTitle = document.getElementById('alert-title');
            const alertBody = document.getElementById('alert-body');
            
            alertTitle.textContent = title;
            alertBody.textContent = message;
            
            banner.classList.remove('hidden');
            setTimeout(() => {
                banner.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 4000);
        }

        function dismissAlert() {
            document.getElementById('alert-banner').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function addToCollection() {
            showCustomAlert("Selection Saved", "The luxury lounge chair has been added to your mood board.");
        }

        function handleSubscribe(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            showCustomAlert("Welcome to L’Avenir", "You have joined the private curations catalog. Watch your inbox.");
            e.target.reset();
        }
    </script>
</body>
