  <script>
    // System Mode Config
    let isDarkMode = false;
    
    // Active Color Way Config
    let currentColorWay = 'silver';

    // Acoustic Simulator config state
    let activeWaveStyle = 'anc';
    let isDocked = false;
    let spatialActive = false;
    let spatialTurnAngle = 0;

    // Headphone colorsets mapping back for dynamic SVGs
    const colorWays = {
      silver: {
        text: 'Silver',
        bg: '#E2E2E4',
        accentBgGlow: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)',
        steelLoop: '#A2A2A7',
        meshCanopy: '#FFFFFF',
        telescopic: '#E5E5E7',
        hinge: '#D1D1D6',
        earcup: '#E5E5E7',
        cushion: '#D1D1D6',
        badge: 'Silver Edition Core'
      },
      spacegray: {
        text: 'Space Gray',
        bg: '#242426',
        accentBgGlow: 'rgba(53, 53, 57, 0.4)',
        steelLoop: '#48484A',
        meshCanopy: '#1C1C1E',
        telescopic: '#3A3A3C',
        hinge: '#2C2C2E',
        earcup: '#353539',
        cushion: '#1C1C1E',
        badge: 'Space Gray stealth'
      },
      skyblue: {
        text: 'Sky Blue',
        bg: '#C5D6E2',
        accentBgGlow: 'rgba(143, 176, 200, 0.4)',
        steelLoop: '#7EA1B9',
        meshCanopy: '#E4F0F6',
        telescopic: '#8FB0C8',
        hinge: '#6A8CA4',
        earcup: '#8FB0C8',
        cushion: '#6A8CA4',
        badge: 'Sky Blue Metallic'
      },
      sunsetpink: {
        text: 'Sunset Pink',
        bg: '#F5D3CE',
        accentBgGlow: 'rgba(232, 154, 143, 0.4)',
        steelLoop: '#DE8A7F',
        meshCanopy: '#FDF0EE',
        telescopic: '#E89A8F',
        hinge: '#C17B71',
        earcup: '#E89A8F',
        cushion: '#C17B71',
        badge: 'Sunset Pink Lustre'
      }
    };

    // Main initializers
    window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      // Initialize Lucide icons
      lucide.createIcons();
      
      // Setup dynamic wave animation
      animateWaveform();
    });

    // Color swapper function
    function switchColorWay(style) {
      if (!colorWays[style]) return;
      currentColorWay = style;
      const data = colorWays[style];

      // Update active color dots scaling layout
      const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.color-dot-btn');
      buttons.forEach(btn => {
        const dotActive = btn.querySelector('.color-dot-active-indicator');
        if (dotActive) dotActive.style.transform = 'scale(0)';
      });

      // Find active button to scale up its ring
      const dotIndexMap = { silver: 0, spacegray: 1, skyblue: 2, sunsetpink: 3 };
      const activeBtn = buttons[dotIndexMap[style]];
      if (activeBtn) {
        const activeIndicator = activeBtn.querySelector('.color-dot-active-indicator');
        if (activeIndicator) activeIndicator.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
      }

      // Transition main body bg
      const appBody = document.getElementById('app-body');
      appBody.style.backgroundColor = data.bg;

      // Swap accent typography matching color choices
      if (style === 'spacegray') {
        appBody.classList.add('dark');
        appBody.style.color = '#F5F5F7';
        isDarkMode = true;
        document.getElementById('theme-icon').setAttribute('data-lucide', 'sun');
        lucide.createIcons();
      } else {
        appBody.classList.remove('dark');
        appBody.style.color = '#1D1D1F';
        isDarkMode = false;
        document.getElementById('theme-icon').setAttribute('data-lucide', 'moon');
        lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // Update dynamic main SVG attributes
      document.getElementById('svg-steel-loop').setAttribute('stroke', data.steelLoop);
      document.getElementById('svg-mesh-canopy').setAttribute('stroke', data.meshCanopy);
      document.getElementById('svg-left-telescopic').setAttribute('fill', data.telescopic);
      document.getElementById('svg-right-telescopic').setAttribute('fill', data.telescopic);
      document.getElementById('svg-left-hinge').setAttribute('fill', data.hinge);
      document.getElementById('svg-right-hinge').setAttribute('fill', data.hinge);
      document.getElementById('svg-left-cup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);
      document.getElementById('svg-right-cup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);
      document.getElementById('svg-left-cushion').setAttribute('fill', data.cushion);
      document.getElementById('svg-right-cushion').setAttribute('fill', data.cushion);

      // Update secondary SVG (Docked case mockup)
      document.getElementById('svg-docked-loop').setAttribute('stroke', data.steelLoop);
      document.getElementById('svg-docked-canopy').setAttribute('stroke', data.meshCanopy);
      document.getElementById('svg-docked-lcup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);
      document.getElementById('svg-docked-rcup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);

      // Update tertiary SVG (Store preview)
      document.getElementById('svg-store-loop').setAttribute('stroke', data.steelLoop);
      document.getElementById('svg-store-canopy').setAttribute('stroke', data.meshCanopy);
      document.getElementById('svg-store-lcup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);
      document.getElementById('svg-store-rcup').setAttribute('fill', data.earcup);

      // Update text details
      document.getElementById('active-model-badge').innerText = data.badge;
      document.getElementById('store-selected-name').innerText = `${data.text} Edition`;

      // Glow color adaptation
      document.getElementById('dynamic-ambient-glow').style.backgroundColor = data.accentBgGlow;

      // Update text markers underline highlights
      const labels = ['silver', 'spacegray'];
      labels.forEach(lbl => {
        const el = document.getElementById(`label-${lbl}`);
        if (el) {
          if (lbl === style) {
            el.className = 'text-neutral-900 dark:text-white border-b-2 border-neutral-900 dark:border-white pb-1';
          } else {
            el.className = 'pb-1';
          }
        }
      });

      // Show temporary custom toast confirmation
      showToast('Colorway Switched', `Finishes updated to premium ${data.text}.`);
    }

    // Toggle day / night manually
    document.getElementById('theme-toggle').addEventListener('click', () => {
      isDarkMode = !isDarkMode;
      const appBody = document.getElementById('app-body');
      const themeIcon = document.getElementById('theme-icon');

      if (isDarkMode) {
        appBody.classList.add('dark');
        themeIcon.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'sun');
      } else {
        appBody.classList.remove('dark');
        themeIcon.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'moon');
      }
      lucide.createIcons();
    });

    // Helper Scrolling Actions
    function scrollToOverview() {
      document.getElementById('overview').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
    
    function scrollToDock() {
      document.getElementById('prices').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }

    // Play simulated audio notification
    function playIntroSound() {
      showToast('Frequency Playback', 'Streaming 3D Spatial calibration chime to connected output...');
    }

    // Dynamic wave simulations
    function changeWaveType(type) {
      activeWaveStyle = type;
      
      const btnAnc = document.getElementById('btn-wave-anc');
      const btnSpatial = document.getElementById('btn-wave-spatial');
      const indicator = document.getElementById('wave-sound-indicator');

      if (type === 'anc') {
        btnAnc.className = 'px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all bg-neutral-900 text-white dark:bg-white dark:text-neutral-900 shadow-sm';
        btnSpatial.className = 'px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all opacity-40 hover:opacity-100';
        indicator.innerText = "ANC Anti-Wave Generator Active";
      } else {
        btnSpatial.className = 'px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all bg-neutral-900 text-white dark:bg-white dark:text-neutral-900 shadow-sm';
        btnAnc.className = 'px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase transition-all opacity-40 hover:opacity-100';
        indicator.innerText = "Spatial Ambient Simulation Wave active";
      }
    }

    // Interactive audio visualizer generator looping
    let waveOffset = 0;
    function animateWaveform() {
      waveOffset += 0.05;

      const waveAmbient = document.getElementById('wave-ambient');
      const waveAnti = document.getElementById('wave-anti');
      const waveMusic = document.getElementById('wave-music');

      if (waveAmbient && waveAnti && waveMusic) {
        const seal = parseFloat(document.getElementById('slider-seal').value) / 100;
        const canc = parseFloat(document.getElementById('slider-cancellation').value) / 100;

        let amp1 = activeWaveStyle === 'anc' ? 25 * seal : 10 * seal;
        let amp2 = activeWaveStyle === 'anc' ? 25 * canc : 30 * canc;

        let pathAmbient = `M 0 60`;
        let pathAnti = `M 0 60`;
        let pathMusic = `M 0 60`;

        for (let x = 0; x <= 600; x += 10) {
          const angle = (x / 600) * Math.PI * 4 + waveOffset;
          
          // Phase shift for anti wave
          const yAmbient = 60 + Math.sin(angle) * amp1;
          const yAnti = 60 + Math.sin(angle + Math.PI) * amp2 * 0.95;
          const yMusic = 60 + Math.cos(angle * 1.5) * 15;

          pathAmbient += ` L ${x} ${yAmbient}`;
          pathAnti += ` L ${x} ${yAnti}`;
          pathMusic += ` L ${x} ${yMusic}`;
        }

        waveAmbient.setAttribute('d', pathAmbient);
        waveAnti.setAttribute('d', pathAnti);
        waveMusic.setAttribute('d', pathMusic);
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animateWaveform);
    }

    function updateAudioSimulation() {
      // Handled in animation loop values
    }

    function triggerVisualizerWave() {
      showToast('Calibration Mode', 'Initiating acoustic feedback loop. Hold headphones close.');
    }

    // Toggle smart dock interactive element
    function toggleSmartDock() {
      isDocked = !isDocked;
      const hps = document.getElementById('dockable-headphones');
      const caseShell = document.getElementById('smart-case-shell');
      const ripple = document.getElementById('energy-ripple');
      const btn = document.getElementById('dock-btn');
      const btnText = document.getElementById('dock-btn-text');
      const tag = document.getElementById('dock-status-tag');

      if (isDocked) {
        // Translate headphone into case
        hps.style.transform = 'translateY(35px) scale(0.9)';
        // Change button state
        btnText.innerText = "Undock Headphones";
        tag.innerText = "ULTRA-LOW POWER DOCKED (100%)";
        tag.className = "text-[9px] font-extrabold tracking-widest uppercase bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-yellow-500/20";
        // Visual pulse
        ripple.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)';
        ripple.style.opacity = '1';
        setTimeout(() => {
          ripple.style.opacity = '0';
        }, 800);
        showToast('Power Preserved', 'AirPods Max transitioned into Ultra-low power mode.');
      } else {
        hps.style.transform = 'translateY(-20px) scale(1)';
        btnText.innerText = "Dock into Smart Case";
        tag.innerText = "ACTIVE STATE (100%)";
        tag.className = "text-[9px] font-extrabold tracking-widest uppercase bg-green-500/10 text-green-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-green-500/20";
        showToast('Active Awake State', 'Audio connection recovered instantaneously.');
      }
    }

    function restoreDefaultSound() {
      isDocked = false;
      const hps = document.getElementById('dockable-headphones');
      hps.style.transform = 'translateY(-20px) scale(1)';
      document.getElementById('dock-btn-text').innerText = "Dock into Smart Case";
      document.getElementById('dock-status-tag').innerText = "ACTIVE STATE (100%)";
      document.getElementById('dock-status-tag').className = "text-[9px] font-extrabold tracking-widest uppercase bg-green-500/10 text-green-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-green-500/20";
    }

    // Spatial head tracking simulator logic
    function toggleSpatialAudio(manual) {
      spatialActive = !spatialActive;
      const status = document.getElementById('spatial-status');
      const btn = document.getElementById('spatial-on-btn');
      const headBtn = document.getElementById('head-move-btn');

      if (spatialActive) {
        status.innerText = "On";
        status.className = "text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-green-500/30";
        headBtn.removeAttribute('disabled');
        headBtn.classList.remove('opacity-50');
        
        // Pulse effects
        document.getElementById('audio-ripple-left').classList.add('opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('audio-ripple-right').classList.add('opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('speaker-l').classList.remove('opacity-40');
        document.getElementById('speaker-r').classList.remove('opacity-40');

        showToast('Spatial Audio Active', 'Gyroscope simulation initialized.');
      } else {
        status.innerText = "Off";
        status.className = "text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-neutral-500/20 text-neutral-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-neutral-500/30";
        headBtn.setAttribute('disabled', 'true');
        headBtn.classList.add('opacity-50');
        
        document.getElementById('audio-ripple-left').classList.remove('opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('audio-ripple-right').classList.remove('opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('speaker-l').classList.add('opacity-40');
        document.getElementById('speaker-r').classList.add('opacity-40');
      }
    }

    function simulateHeadMovement() {
      if (!spatialActive) return;
      // alternate angle
      spatialTurnAngle = spatialTurnAngle === 0 ? 35 : (spatialTurnAngle === 35 ? -35 : 0);
      const head = document.getElementById('spatial-head');
      head.style.transform = `rotate(${spatialTurnAngle}deg)`;

      // alter balance channels feedback
      const leftCh = document.getElementById('speaker-l');
      const rightCh = document.getElementById('speaker-r');

      if (spatialTurnAngle > 0) {
        leftCh.style.opacity = "1";
        rightCh.style.opacity = "0.2";
        showToast('Soundscape Shifted', 'Acoustics balanced to dynamic left-oriented focus.');
      } else if (spatialTurnAngle < 0) {
        leftCh.style.opacity = "0.2";
        rightCh.style.opacity = "1";
        showToast('Soundscape Shifted', 'Acoustics balanced to dynamic right-oriented focus.');
      } else {
        leftCh.style.opacity = "0.8";
        rightCh.style.opacity = "0.8";
      }
    }

    // Live custom engraving text updater
    function updateEngravingText() {
      // Placeholder option for live preview logic if required
    }

    // Success store action
    function purchaseSuccess() {
      const input = document.getElementById('engraving-input').value;
      const designChoice = colorWays[currentColorWay].text;
      const textMessage = input ? `with custom engraving "${input}"` : "";
      
      showToast('Order Initialized', `Added ${designChoice} AirPods Max ${textMessage} to checkout bag.`);
    }

    // Toast alerts helper
    function showToast(title, desc) {
      const toast = document.getElementById('toast-notification');
      document.getElementById('toast-title').innerText = title;
      document.getElementById('toast-desc').innerText = desc;

      toast.className = "fixed bottom-6 left-6 z-50 transform translate-y-0 opacity-100 transition-all duration-500 max-w-sm w-full bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 border border-black/10 dark:border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-2xl flex items-start gap-4";
      
      // Auto dismiss after 5 seconds
      setTimeout(() => {
        hideToast();
      }, 5000);
    }

    function hideToast() {
      const toast = document.getElementById('toast-notification');
      toast.className = "fixed bottom-6 left-6 z-50 transform translate-y-24 opacity-0 transition-all duration-500 max-w-sm w-full bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 border border-black/10 dark:border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-2xl flex items-start gap-4";
    }
  </script>
</body>

                <!-- FAQ Item 2 -->

                    <button onclick="toggleFAQ(2)" class="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-left focus:outline-none">
                        <span class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-charcoal">Are all the food components certified organic?</span>
                        <span id="faq-icon-2" class="text-brand-coral text-xl font-extrabold transition-transform">+</span>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-ans-2" class="hidden mt-4 text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed transition-all">
                        Absolutely. We cooperate directly with verified domestic eco-farms to ensure all salads, vegetables, fruits, and premium meats are sourced in a sustainable, chemical-free way.
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- FAQ Item 3 -->
                <div class="premium-blur-card rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300">
                    <button onclick="toggleFAQ(3)" class="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-left focus:outline-none">
                        <span class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-charcoal">Can I cancel or reschedule my private booking?</span>
                        <span id="faq-icon-3" class="text-brand-coral text-xl font-extrabold transition-transform">+</span>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-ans-3" class="hidden mt-4 text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed transition-all">
                        Yes, rescheduling or cancellation is absolutely free up to 24 hours prior to the cooking session directly from your customer dashboard or the Foodly mobile app.
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>


    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer class="bg-brand-charcoal text-white/80 py-16 px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24 border-t border-white/5 relative z-20">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12">

                    Subscribe to receive premium weekly recipes & special local chef arrival notifications.

                    <button onclick="triggerToast('Thank you for subscribing!')" class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-coral hover:bg-brand-coral-dark text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-colors">Join</button>

            <div class="flex gap-6">
                <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Privacy Policy</a>
                <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Terms of Use</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>


    <!-- INTERACTIVE SLIDE-OUT CART DRAWER -->
    <div id="cart-drawer" class="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full sm:w-[420px] bg-brand-cream/95 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] z-50 transform translate-x-full transition-transform duration-500 ease-in-out border-l border-brand-charcoal/5 flex flex-col">
        <!-- Header -->
        <div class="p-6 border-b border-brand-charcoal/5 flex justify-between items-center bg-white/50">
            <h3 class="text-xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal flex items-center gap-2">
                🛍️ Your Order
            </h3>
            <button onclick="toggleCartDrawer(false)" class="p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-coral/10 hover:text-brand-coral text-brand-charcoal/60 transition-colors">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-6 w-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Scrollable items inside cart -->
        <div id="cart-items-list" class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4 no-scrollbar">
            <!-- Dynamic food selection items loaded here -->
            <div class="text-center py-20 text-brand-charcoal/50 space-y-2">
                <p class="text-4xl">🌾</p>
                <p class="font-semibold text-sm">Your organic basket is currently empty.</p>
                <p class="text-xs">Add delicious dishes from our curated Top List above!</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer Checkout details -->
        <div class="p-6 bg-white/75 border-t border-brand-charcoal/5 space-y-4">
            <div class="space-y-2">
                <div class="flex justify-between text-sm text-brand-charcoal/65 font-semibold">
                    <span>Subtotal</span>
                    <span id="cart-subtotal">0$</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between text-sm text-brand-charcoal/65 font-semibold">
                    <span>Chef prep fee</span>
                    <span id="cart-prep-fee">0$</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between text-base font-black text-brand-charcoal pt-2 border-t border-brand-charcoal/5">
                    <span>Grand Total</span>
                    <span id="cart-grand-total" class="text-brand-coral text-lg">0$</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <button onclick="checkoutOrder()" class="w-full py-4 bg-brand-charcoal hover:bg-brand-coral text-white font-extrabold rounded-full shadow-[0_12px_30px_rgba(30,37,34,0.1)] hover:shadow-glow transition-all duration-300">
                Proceed to Checkout
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- INTERACTIVE RESERVATION / BOOKING MODAL -->
    <div id="booking-modal" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-brand-charcoal/40 backdrop-blur-md opacity-0 pointer-events-none transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="relative w-full max-w-lg premium-blur-card rounded-[40px] shadow-[0_30px_70px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] p-8 md:p-10 transform scale-95 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden">
            <!-- Accent Glowing circle inside Modal -->
            <div class="absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-36 h-36 rounded-full bg-brand-coral/10 blur-xl"></div>
            
            <!-- Close Button -->
            <button onclick="closeBookingModal()" class="absolute top-6 right-6 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-coral/10 hover:text-brand-coral text-brand-charcoal/60 transition-colors">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-6 w-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
                </svg>
            </button>

            <!-- Form Content -->
            <div class="space-y-6">
                <div class="text-center space-y-2">
                    <span class="text-3xl">👨‍🍳</span>
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-black text-brand-charcoal">Reserve Foodly Table or Chef</h3>
                    <p class="text-brand-charcoal/60 text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase">SECURE PREMIUM DINING AT HOME OR INSTANT TABLES</p>
                </div>

                <form id="reservation-form" onsubmit="submitReservation(event)" class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/60 uppercase">Your Name</label>
                            <input required type="text" placeholder="John Doe" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 border border-brand-charcoal/5 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-coral text-sm font-medium">
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/60 uppercase">Email Address</label>
                            <input required type="email" placeholder="john@example.com" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 border border-brand-charcoal/5 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-coral text-sm font-medium">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="space-y-1">
                        <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/60 uppercase">Service Type</label>
                        <select class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 border border-brand-charcoal/5 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-coral text-sm font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/85">
                            <option>Book Chef to Prepare at Home</option>
                            <option>Book Premium Table at Restaurant</option>
                            <option>Exquisite Catering Event Support</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/60 uppercase">Select Date</label>
                            <input required type="date" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 border border-brand-charcoal/5 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-coral text-sm font-medium">
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/60 uppercase">Select Time</label>
                            <input required type="time" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 border border-brand-charcoal/5 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-coral text-sm font-medium">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="w-full py-4 bg-brand-coral hover:bg-brand-coral-dark text-white font-extrabold rounded-2xl shadow-[0_12px_25px_rgba(255,100,66,0.3)] hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300 mt-2">
                        Confirm Reservation
                    </button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- SUCCESS RESERVATION OVERLAY/NOTIFY DIALOG -->
    <div id="success-dialog" class="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-brand-charcoal/55 backdrop-blur-md opacity-0 pointer-events-none transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="bg-white rounded-[40px] p-8 md:p-10 max-w-md w-full text-center space-y-6 shadow-2xl scale-95 transition-all duration-300">
            <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600 flex items-center justify-center text-3xl mx-auto shadow-inner animate-bounce">
                ✓
            </div>
            <div class="space-y-2">
                <h3 class="text-2xl font-black text-brand-charcoal">Reservation Confirmed!</h3>
                <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                    Thank you! Your gourmet arrangement is registered. A food representative and assigned culinary expert will contact you within 2 hours.
                </p>
            </div>
            <button onclick="closeSuccessDialog()" class="w-full py-3.5 bg-brand-charcoal hover:bg-brand-coral text-white font-bold rounded-2xl transition-colors">
                Awesome, thank you!
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- DYNAMIC POPUP TOAST SYSTEM -->
    <div id="toast-notification" class="fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 px-6 py-3.5 rounded-full bg-brand-charcoal text-white text-xs font-bold shadow-2xl border border-white/10 flex items-center gap-2 transform translate-y-20 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 pointer-events-none">
        <span id="toast-msg">Item added to basket!</span>
    </div>


    <!-- JAVASCRIPT STATE CONTROLLERS -->
    <script>
        // Global Cart state Management
        let cart = [];
        const prepFee = 15; // static chef prep/delivery fee

        // Carousel Slide Controller
        let currentSlide = 0;
        function slideCarousel(direction) {
            const track = document.getElementById('carousel-track');
            const totalWidth = track.scrollWidth;
            const viewWidth = track.clientWidth;
            const cardWidth = 340 + 32; // card size + margin gap
            
            if (direction === 'next') {
                if ((currentSlide + 1) * cardWidth < totalWidth - viewWidth + cardWidth) {
                    currentSlide++;
                } else {
                    currentSlide = 0; // loop back
                }
            } else {
                if (currentSlide > 0) {
                    currentSlide--;
                } else {
                    currentSlide = Math.floor((totalWidth - viewWidth) / cardWidth); // jump to end
                }
            }
            track.style.transform = `translateX(-${currentSlide * cardWidth}px)`;
        }

        // Add item to shopping Basket
        function addToCart(name, price, type) {
            // Check if item exists
            const existingItemIndex = cart.findIndex(item => item.name === name);
            if (existingItemIndex > -1) {
                cart[existingItemIndex].quantity += 1;
            } else {
                cart.push({ name, price, type, quantity: 1 });
            }
            
            updateCartUI();
            triggerToast(`Added ${name} to your basket!`);
        }

        // Remove item from basket
        function removeFromCart(name) {
            cart = cart.filter(item => item.name !== name);
            updateCartUI();
            triggerToast(`Removed from basket.`);
        }

        // Update Cart Counts, badges, and render item lists
        function updateCartUI() {
            const cartItemsList = document.getElementById('cart-items-list');
            const badge = document.getElementById('cart-badge-count');
            
            // Total items sum
            const totalItems = cart.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.quantity, 0);
            
            // Handle badge animation & visibility
            if (totalItems > 0) {
                badge.innerText = totalItems;
                badge.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-0');
                badge.classList.add('opacity-100', 'scale-100');
            } else {
                badge.classList.add('opacity-0', 'scale-0');
                badge.classList.remove('opacity-100', 'scale-100');
            }

            // Render List
            if (cart.length === 0) {
                cartItemsList.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="text-center py-20 text-brand-charcoal/50 space-y-2">
                        <p class="text-4xl">🌾</p>
                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm">Your organic basket is currently empty.</p>
                        <p class="text-xs">Add delicious dishes from our curated Top List above!</p>
                    </div>
                `;
                document.getElementById('cart-subtotal').innerText = '0$';
                document.getElementById('cart-prep-fee').innerText = '0$';
                document.getElementById('cart-grand-total').innerText = '0$';
                return;
            }

            let html = '';
            let subtotal = 0;

            cart.forEach(item => {
                const itemTotal = item.price * item.quantity;
                subtotal += itemTotal;
                
                // Set appropriate mini avatar or outline for item based on type
                let iconMarkup = '🍽️';
                if (item.type === 'salad') iconMarkup = '🥗';
                if (item.type === 'soup') iconMarkup = '🥣';
                if (item.type === 'pineapple') iconMarkup = '🍍';
                if (item.type === 'salmon') iconMarkup = '🥩';
                if (item.type === 'sweetpotato') iconMarkup = '🍠';

                html += `
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm border border-brand-charcoal/5 animate-fade-in">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">${iconMarkup}</span>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal leading-tight">${item.name}</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/50 font-medium mt-0.5">${item.price}$ x ${item.quantity}</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-sm font-black text-brand-charcoal">${itemTotal}$</span>
                            <button onclick="removeFromCart('${item.name}')" class="text-brand-coral hover:text-brand-charcoal p-1">
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.5" d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16" />
                                </svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });

            cartItemsList.innerHTML = html;
            
            // Computations
            document.getElementById('cart-subtotal').innerText = `${subtotal}$`;
            document.getElementById('cart-prep-fee').innerText = `${prepFee}$`;
            document.getElementById('cart-grand-total').innerText = `${subtotal + prepFee}$`;
        }

        // Toggle Drawer view state
        function toggleCartDrawer(open) {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('cart-drawer');
            if (open) {
                drawer.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
            } else {
                drawer.classList.add('translate-x-full');
            }
        }

        // Simulated Checkout trigger
        function checkoutOrder() {
            if (cart.length === 0) {
                triggerToast('Please add items to your basket before checking out.');
                return;
            }
            toggleCartDrawer(false);
            openBookingModal();
        }

        // Reservation Bookings Modals
        function openBookingModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('booking-modal');
            modal.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
            modal.children[0].classList.remove('scale-95');
            modal.children[0].classList.add('scale-100');
        }

        function closeBookingModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('booking-modal');
            modal.classList.add('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
            modal.children[0].classList.remove('scale-100');
            modal.children[0].classList.add('scale-95');
        }

        function submitReservation(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            closeBookingModal();
            
            // clear cart if checkout reservation triggered
            cart = [];
            updateCartUI();

            // Open Confirmation success screen
            const success = document.getElementById('success-dialog');
            success.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
            success.children[0].classList.remove('scale-95');
            success.children[0].classList.add('scale-100');
        }

        function closeSuccessDialog() {
            const success = document.getElementById('success-dialog');
            success.classList.add('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
            success.children[0].classList.add('scale-95');
            success.children[0].classList.remove('scale-100');
        }

        // APP SIMULATOR INTERACTIVE SWITCH STATES
        function changeSimState(stateIndex) {
            const state1 = document.getElementById('sim-state-1');
            const state2 = document.getElementById('sim-state-2');
            const state3 = document.getElementById('sim-state-3');

            state1.classList.add('hidden');
            state2.classList.add('hidden');
            state3.classList.add('hidden');

            if (stateIndex === 1) state1.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (stateIndex === 2) state2.classList.remove('hidden');
            if (stateIndex === 3) state3.classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        // FAQ accordion click handler
        function toggleFAQ(index) {
            const ans = document.getElementById(`faq-ans-${index}`);
            const icon = document.getElementById(`faq-icon-${index}`);
            
            if (ans.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                ans.classList.remove('hidden');
                icon.innerText = '−';
                icon.classList.add('rotate-180');
            } else {
                ans.classList.add('hidden');
                icon.innerText = '+';
                icon.classList.remove('rotate-180');
            }
        }

        // Dynamic Toast triggers
        let toastTimeout;
        function triggerToast(message) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('toast-notification');
            const msg = document.getElementById('toast-msg');
            msg.innerText = message;
            
            clearTimeout(toastTimeout);
            toast.classList.remove('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
            toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');

            toastTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.add('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
                toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
            }, 3000);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
13

  <!-- Lucide Icons -->
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>

  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          fontFamily: {
            serif: ['"Cormorant Garamond"', 'serif'],
            sans: ['"Plus Jakarta Sans"', 'sans-serif'],
          },
          colors: {
            brand: {
              cream: '#f9e9d9',

              chocolateLight: '#733e29',

          },
          animation: {
            'float-slow': 'float 8s ease-in-out infinite',
            'float-medium': 'floatMedium 6s ease-in-out infinite',
            'pulse-subtle': 'pulseSubtle 4s ease-in-out infinite',
            'wave-slow': 'wave 20s linear infinite',
          },
          keyframes: {
            float: {
              '0%, 100%': { transform: 'translateY(0px) rotate(0deg)' },
              '50%': { transform: 'translateY(-15px) rotate(1.5deg)' },
            },
            floatMedium: {
              '0%, 100%': { transform: 'translateY(0px) rotate(0deg)' },
              '50%': { transform: 'translateY(-10px) rotate(-1deg)' },
            },
            pulseSubtle: {
              '0%, 100%': { opacity: '0.8', transform: 'scale(1)' },
              '50%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'scale(1.03)' },
            },
            wave: {
              '0%': { transform: 'translateX(0)' },
              '100%': { transform: 'translateX(-50%)' },
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    /* Premium custom styling and overlays */
    .noise-bg {
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      opacity: 0.025;
    }
    
    /* Custom Scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
      width: 8px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {

  <!-- SCRIPTING FOR DYNAMIC INTERACTIONS -->
  <script>
    // Initialize Lucide Icons
    lucide.createIcons();

    // Sound FX variables
    let audioCtx = null;
    let isSoundEnabled = true; // Enabled by default for rich immersion

    // Web Audio Chocolate Crack sound synthesizer
    function playCrackSound() {
      if (!isSoundEnabled) return;
      try {
        if (!audioCtx) {
          audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        }
        if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
          audioCtx.resume();
        }

        // --- STAGE 1: High Pitch CRISP CRACK (the initial snap of chocolate shell) ---
        const noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, audioCtx.sampleRate * 0.08, audioCtx.sampleRate);
        const output = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
        for (let i = 0; i < noiseBuffer.length; i++) {
          output[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
        }

        const whiteNoise = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
        whiteNoise.buffer = noiseBuffer;

        const noiseFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        noiseFilter.type = 'highpass';
        noiseFilter.frequency.setValueAtTime(3200, audioCtx.currentTime);
        noiseFilter.Q.setValueAtTime(4, audioCtx.currentTime);

        const noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
        noiseGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime);
        noiseGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.005, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.08);

        whiteNoise.connect(noiseFilter);
        noiseFilter.connect(noiseGain);
        noiseGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        whiteNoise.start();

        // --- STAGE 2: Deep Crunchy Pop Resonance ---
        const crunchOsc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
        const crunchGain = audioCtx.createGain();

        crunchOsc.type = 'triangle';
        crunchOsc.frequency.setValueAtTime(140, audioCtx.currentTime);
        crunchOsc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(45, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.12);

        crunchGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, audioCtx.currentTime);
        crunchGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.12);

        crunchOsc.connect(crunchGain);
        crunchGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        crunchOsc.start();
        crunchOsc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.15);

      } catch (e) {
        console.warn("Audio Context init blocked or failed.", e);
      }
    }

    // Play luxurious wave melt ambient sound effect
    function playChocolateASMR() {
      playCrackSound();
      showToast("🍫 ASMR Melt Wave Playback Simulated");
    }

    // Audio status toggle
    function toggleSound() {
      isSoundEnabled = !isSoundEnabled;
      const icon = document.getElementById('soundIcon');
      const btn = document.getElementById('soundBtn');
      if (isSoundEnabled) {
        icon.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'volume-2');
        showToast("🔈 Interactive Crack Sounds On");
      } else {
        icon.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'volume-x');
        showToast("🔇 Interactive Sounds Muted");
      }
      lucide.createIcons();
    }

    // Toast Notification helper
    function showToast(message) {
      const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
      const msg = document.getElementById('toastMsg');
      msg.textContent = message;
      toast.classList.remove('translate-y-24', 'opacity-0');
      toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
      
      setTimeout(() => {
        toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
        toast.classList.add('translate-y-24', 'opacity-0');
      }, 2500);
    }

    // Mobile menu toggle
    function toggleMobileMenu() {
      const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
      if (menu.classList.contains('translate-x-full')) {
        menu.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
        menu.classList.add('translate-x-0');
      } else {
        menu.classList.remove('translate-x-0');
        menu.classList.add('translate-x-full');
      }
    }

    // Interactive bite simulation on the main visual stick!
    let biteCount = 0;
    function handleStickClick() {
      playCrackSound();
      
      const chocoShell = document.getElementById('outerChocoShell');
      const caramelDrips = document.getElementById('caramelDrips');
      
      biteCount++;
      if (biteCount === 1) {
        // Crack open top shell partially
        chocoShell.style.transform = "scale(0.96) rotate(-1deg)";
        chocoShell.style.opacity = "0.75";
        showToast("💥 Pure Belgian Chocolate Shell Cracked!");
      } else if (biteCount === 2) {
        // Expose caramel dripping layer
        chocoShell.style.transform = "scale(0.9) rotate(-3deg) translateY(-20px)";
        chocoShell.style.opacity = "0.2";
        caramelDrips.style.transform = "scale(1.05) translateY(5px)";
        showToast("🍯 Luscious Double Caramel Exposed!");
      } else {
        // Reset state
        chocoShell.style.transform = "none";
        chocoShell.style.opacity = "1";
        caramelDrips.style.transform = "none";
        biteCount = 0;
        showToast("🔄 Magnum Restored — Bite Again!");
      }
    }

    // Flavor Database matching the premium palette
    const flavorData = [

        gradientFrom: '#fbcfe8',

        gradientFrom: '#fef08a',

        gradientTo: '#713f12',
        chocoGradStart: '#7c2d12',

        progressNum: '03',
        progressWidth: '100%'
      }
    ];

    // Core interactive flavor switching logic
    function switchFlavor(index) {
      playCrackSound();
      
      const flavor = flavorData[index];
      
      // Update Copy with transition
      const titleElem = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
      const descElem = document.getElementById('heroDesc');
      
      titleElem.style.opacity = '0';
      titleElem.style.transform = 'translateY(10px)';
      descElem.style.opacity = '0';
      
      setTimeout(() => {
        titleElem.innerHTML = flavor.title;
        descElem.textContent = flavor.desc;
        titleElem.style.opacity = '1';
        titleElem.style.transform = 'none';
        descElem.style.opacity = '1';
      }, 3500 * 0.1); // Fast aesthetic switch

      // Update background gradient colors on body smoothly
      document.body.style.backgroundImage = `linear-gradient(to bottom right, ${flavor.gradientFrom}, ${flavor.gradientVia}, ${flavor.gradientTo})`;
      
      // Update SVG Gradients inside the Magnum stick
      const chocoMain = document.getElementById('chocoMain');
      chocoMain.children[0].setAttribute('stop-color', flavor.chocoGradStart);
      chocoMain.children[1].setAttribute('stop-color', flavor.chocoGradMid);
      chocoMain.children[2].setAttribute('stop-color', flavor.chocoGradEnd);

      const caramelDrip = document.getElementById('caramelDrip');
      caramelDrip.children[0].setAttribute('stop-color', flavor.accentGradStart);
      caramelDrip.children[2].setAttribute('stop-color', flavor.accentGradEnd);

      // Update Ambient Aura
      const aura = document.getElementById('glowAura');
      aura.className = `absolute w-72 h-72 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr ${flavor.glowAura} blur-3xl opacity-80 animate-pulse-subtle`;

      // Update Pagination Indicator
      document.getElementById('progressLine').style.width = flavor.progressWidth;
      document.getElementById('progressNum').textContent = flavor.progressNum;

      // Toggle Active Button Styles
      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        const btn = document.getElementById(`flavorBtn${i}`);
        if (i === index) {
          btn.className = "w-full flex items-center justify-between p-3.5 rounded-2xl bg-brand-cream/20 text-brand-chocolateDark border border-brand-cream/30 hover:bg-brand-cream/30 transition-all duration-300 text-left group";
        } else {
          btn.className = "w-full flex items-center justify-between p-3.5 rounded-2xl bg-transparent text-brand-chocolateDark border border-transparent hover:bg-brand-cream/10 transition-all duration-300 text-left group";
        }
      }

      showToast(`✨ Selected: ${flavor.progressNum === '01' ? 'Double Caramel' : flavor.progressNum === '02' ? 'Double Raspberry' : 'Billionaire'}`);
    }

    const hotspotData = {

    // Hotspot activation switcher
    function activateHotspot(id) {
      playCrackSound();
      
      const content = hotspotData[id];
      const div = document.getElementById('hotspotContent');
      
      // Fade out
      div.style.opacity = '0';
      div.style.transform = 'translateY(10px)';
      
      setTimeout(() => {
        div.innerHTML = `
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <span class="text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-bold text-brand-caramel">${content.subtitle}</span>
            <h3 class="font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-brand-creamLight">${content.title}</h3>
            <p class="text-brand-cream/80 leading-relaxed text-sm md:text-base">
              ${content.body}
            </p>
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 pt-4 border-t border-brand-cream/10">
              <div>
                <span class="text-[11px] text-brand-cream/50 uppercase tracking-widest block">Core Spec</span>
                <span class="font-serif text-xl font-bold text-brand-caramel">${content.val1}</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="text-[11px] text-brand-cream/50 uppercase tracking-widest block">Craftsmanship</span>
                <span class="font-serif text-xl font-bold text-brand-caramel">${content.val2}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        // Fade in
        div.style.opacity = '1';
        div.style.transform = 'none';
      }, 200);

      // Highlight active button indicators in pagination
      for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
        const btn = document.getElementById(`hotspotTab${i}`);
        if (i === id) {
          btn.className = "w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-cream text-brand-chocolateDark font-bold text-xs transition-colors";
        } else {
          btn.className = "w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-cream/10 text-brand-cream hover:bg-brand-cream/20 font-bold text-xs transition-colors";
        }
      }
    }

    // Form submission simulation
    function handleFormSubmit(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      const success = document.getElementById('formSuccessMsg');
      success.classList.remove('hidden');
      success.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => {
        success.style.opacity = '1';
      }, 50);
    }

    // Parallax interactive mouse-move effect on the ice cream stick!
    const parallaxEl = document.querySelector('[hover-parallax]');
    if (parallaxEl) {
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        const x = (window.innerWidth / 2 - e.clientX) / 25;
        const y = (window.innerHeight / 2 - e.clientY) / 25;
        parallaxEl.style.transform = `translateY(${y}px) translateX(${x}px) rotate(${x * 0.1}deg)`;
      });
    }
  </script>
</body>

                <path d="M0,0 L1440,0 L1440,30 C1400,30 1380,85 1350,85 C1320,85 1310,25 1270,25 C1230,25 1210,110 1170,110 C1130,110 1120,40 1080,40 C1040,40 1020,95 980,95 C940,95 930,15 890,15 C850,15 830,115 790,115 C750,115 740,35 700,35 C660,35 640,105 600,105 C560,105 550,20 510,20 C470,20 450,90 410,90 C370,90 360,30 320,30 C280,30 260,115 220,115 C180,115 170,45 130,45 C90,45 70,80 30,80 C15,80 0,20 0,20 Z" />
            </svg>
        </div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-20">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 pb-16 border-b border-white/10">
                
                <!-- Brand details & newsletter -->

                        <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-creamery-maroon border border-creamery-cyan rounded-full flex items-center justify-center glow-cyan">
                            <span class="text-creamery-cyan text-base">🍦</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="font-brush text-xl md:text-2xl tracking-wider text-creamery-cream block">C&A Cafe & Creamery</span>
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-creamery-creambase/70 text-xs md:text-sm leading-relaxed">
                        Indulge in artisanal pastry arts, handcraft beverages, slow-churned gelato varieties, and custom cone configurations. Made daily with unyielding love.
                    </p>
                    
                    <!-- Newsletter Signup Form -->

                        <h4 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-creamery-cyan">Unlock Secret Recipes & Flavors</h4>

        <!-- Main Chat Toggle Button -->

            <span class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3.5 h-3.5 bg-creamery-raspberry rounded-full border-2 border-creamery-maroon animate-ping"></span>

            <!-- Header -->

                    </div>

            </div>

                <button onclick="sendQuickMessage('Is the Raspberry flavor vegan?')" class="bg-creamery-cream hover:bg-creamery-creambase text-creamery-maroon font-bold text-[10px] py-1.5 px-3 rounded-full border border-creamery-creambase transition-colors">Vegan Options?</button>
                <button onclick="sendQuickMessage('Do you cater events?')" class="bg-creamery-cream hover:bg-creamery-creambase text-creamery-maroon font-bold text-[10px] py-1.5 px-3 rounded-full border border-creamery-creambase transition-colors">Event Catering?</button>
                <button onclick="sendQuickMessage('Can I order midnight delivery?')" class="bg-creamery-cream hover:bg-creamery-creambase text-creamery-maroon font-bold text-[10px] py-1.5 px-3 rounded-full border border-creamery-creambase transition-colors">Midnight Delivery?</button>
            </div>

                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-2">
                    <input id="promo-input" type="text" placeholder="e.g. SWEETDREAMS" class="w-full bg-creamery-cream text-creamery-maroon uppercase border border-creamery-creambase rounded-xl p-2 text-xs outline-none focus:border-creamery-raspberry">
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Price Tally -->
            <div class="space-y-2 border-t border-creamery-creambase/50 pt-3 text-xs">

                    <span>Subtotal</span>
                    <span id="cart-subtotal">$0.00</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between text-creamery-raspberry font-semibold hidden" id="discount-row">
                    <span>Discount (15%)</span>
                    <span id="cart-discount">-$0.00</span>

                    <span>Estimated Total</span>

        <div class="bg-white border-2 border-creamery-creambase rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-sm w-full text-center space-y-6 shadow-2xl relative">

                    <span class="text-creamery-raspberry font-mono" id="order-id-display">#CA-89721</span>

                Sounds Divine, Thank You!

    <!-- ==================== CORE INTERACTIVE JAVASCRIPT ==================== -->
    <script>
        // State variables
        let cart = [];
        let appliedPromo = false;

        // Customizer configuration state
        let customizerState = {
            cone: { name: 'waffle', color: '#d97706', extraPrice: 0.00 },
            flavors: {
                layer1: { name: 'raspberry', color: '#ff2d6c' },
                layer2: null, // Default none
                layer3: null  // Default none
            },
            toppings: {
                sprinkles: false,
                fudge: false,
                berries: false,
                gold: false
            }
        };

        // Pricing Matrix
        const PRICING = {
            baseScoop: 4.50,
            extraScoop: 2.00,
            topping: 0.50
        };

        // Window onload triggers
        window.onload = function () {
            // Initiate default visual builder rendering
            calculateCustomizerPrice();
        }

        // ==================== NAVIGATION DRAWER ====================
        function toggleMobileNav(show) {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
            if (show) {
                drawer.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
            } else {
                drawer.classList.add('translate-x-full');
            }
        }

        // ==================== VISUAL CUSTOMIZER CONTROLS ====================
        
        function setCone(coneName, colorHex, extraPrice) {
            // Update active state class on buttons
            const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.cone-btn');
            buttons.forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active', 'border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
                btn.classList.add('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');
            });
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('active', 'border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
            event.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');

            // Update configuration state
            customizerState.cone.name = coneName;
            customizerState.cone.color = colorHex;
            customizerState.cone.extraPrice = extraPrice;

            // Render color directly onto cone path
            document.getElementById('cone-path').setAttribute('fill', colorHex);
            
            calculateCustomizerPrice();
        }

        function setScoopFlavor(layerIndex, flavorName, colorHex) {
            // Update button states for Layer 1 selector
            if (layerIndex === 1) {
                const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.scoop-1-btn');
                buttons.forEach(btn => {
                    btn.classList.remove('active', 'border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
                    btn.classList.add('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');
                });
                event.currentTarget.classList.add('active', 'border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
                event.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');
            }

            // Set state flavor details
            customizerState.flavors.layer1.name = flavorName;
            customizerState.flavors.layer1.color = colorHex;

            // Render live color onto scoop 1 element
            document.getElementById('visual-scoop-1').style.backgroundColor = colorHex;

            calculateCustomizerPrice();
        }

        function updateScoopLayer(layerIndex, selectedValue) {
            const element = document.getElementById(`visual-scoop-${layerIndex}`);
            
            if (selectedValue === 'none') {
                customizerState.flavors[`layer${layerIndex}`] = null;
                element.classList.add('hidden');
            } else {
                let colorHex = '#fff';
                switch (selectedValue) {
                    case 'raspberry': colorHex = '#ff2d6c'; break;
                    case 'matcha': colorHex = '#86efac'; break;
                    case 'chocolate': colorHex = '#3a1e05'; break;
                    case 'vanilla': colorHex = '#fef3c7'; break;
                }
                customizerState.flavors[`layer${layerIndex}`] = { name: selectedValue, color: colorHex };
                element.style.backgroundColor = colorHex;
                element.classList.remove('hidden');
            }

            calculateCustomizerPrice();
        }

        function toggleTopping(toppingName, cost) {
            const btn = document.getElementById(`topping-${toppingName}-btn`);
            const visualElement = document.getElementById(`visual-topping-${toppingName}`);
            
            // Toggle boolean selection state
            customizerState.toppings[toppingName] = !customizerState.toppings[toppingName];

            if (customizerState.toppings[toppingName]) {
                btn.classList.add('border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
                btn.classList.remove('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');
                visualElement.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                btn.classList.remove('border-creamery-raspberry', 'bg-creamery-cream');
                btn.classList.add('border-creamery-creambase', 'bg-white');
                visualElement.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            calculateCustomizerPrice();
        }

        function calculateCustomizerPrice() {
            let total = PRICING.baseScoop;

            // Add cone premium
            total += customizerState.cone.extraPrice;

            // Add extra layers
            if (customizerState.flavors.layer2) total += PRICING.extraScoop;
            if (customizerState.flavors.layer3) total += PRICING.extraScoop;

            // Add toppings
            Object.keys(customizerState.toppings).forEach(topping => {
                if (customizerState.toppings[topping]) {
                    total += PRICING.topping;
                }
            });

            // Render live pricing updates
            document.getElementById('custom-price-display').innerText = `$${total.toFixed(2)}`;
            return total;
        }

        function resetCustomizer() {
            // Reset to defaults
            setCone('waffle', '#d97706', 0.00);
            
            // Set first scoop active back to raspberry
            setScoopFlavor(1, 'raspberry', '#ff2d6c');

            // Set drop-downs back to none
            const selectors = [2, 3];
            selectors.forEach(idx => {
                updateScoopLayer(idx, 'none');
            });

            // Turn off toppings
            const toppingsKeys = ['sprinkles', 'fudge', 'berries', 'gold'];
            toppingsKeys.forEach(t => {
                customizerState.toppings[t] = true; // Invert logic for standard toggle helper
                toggleTopping(t, 0.50);
            });
        }


        // ==================== ORDER / CART MANAGEMENT LOGIC ====================

        function addCustomScoopToCart() {
            const price = calculateCustomizerPrice();
            
            // Build descriptional item name based on stacked selections
            let itemName = `Custom Scoop (${customizerState.cone.name.toUpperCase()} Cone`;
            let layerCount = 1;
            
            if (customizerState.flavors.layer2) layerCount++;
            if (customizerState.flavors.layer3) layerCount++;

            itemName += `, ${layerCount}-Layers Stack`;

            // List active toppings
            let toppingsList = [];
            Object.keys(customizerState.toppings).forEach(t => {
                if (customizerState.toppings[t]) toppingsList.push(t);
            });
            
            if (toppingsList.length > 0) {
                itemName += ` + Topped with ${toppingsList.join(', ')}`;
            }
            itemName += ')';

            // Insert custom scoop into cart
            const item = {
                id: 'custom-' + Date.now(),
                name: itemName,
                price: price,
                quantity: 1,
                isCustom: true
            };

            cart.push(item);
            updateCartUI();
            
            // Prompt User Success Animation (Using inline custom visual prompt instead of alert)
            triggerToastNotification('Custom gelato stack added directly to your tray! 🍦');
            
            // Auto open the tray so they can see their gorgeous masterpiece inside
            setTimeout(() => {
                toggleCartDrawer(true);
            }, 800);
        }

        function addCatalogToCart(name, price) {
            // Search if catalog item already exists inside the tray
            const matchIndex = cart.findIndex(item => item.name === name);

            if (matchIndex > -1) {
                cart[matchIndex].quantity += 1;
            } else {
                cart.push({
                    id: 'catalog-' + Date.now(),
                    name: name,
                    price: price,
                    quantity: 1,
                    isCustom: false
                });
            }

            updateCartUI();
            triggerToastNotification(`"${name}" added to your tray! ✨`);
        }

        function removeCartItem(itemId) {
            cart = cart.filter(item => item.id !== itemId);
            updateCartUI();
        }

        function updateCartUI() {
            const badge = document.getElementById('cart-counter-badge');
            const list = document.getElementById('cart-items-list');
            const emptyState = document.getElementById('empty-cart-state');

            // Count total units in the tray
            let totalCount = 0;
            let subtotal = 0;

            cart.forEach(item => {
                totalCount += item.quantity;
                subtotal += (item.price * item.quantity);
            });

            // Update header badge
            badge.innerText = totalCount;
            badge.classList.remove('scale-100');
            badge.classList.add('scale-125', 'bg-creamery-raspberry');
            setTimeout(() => {
                badge.classList.remove('scale-125', 'bg-creamery-raspberry');
                badge.classList.add('scale-100');
            }, 300);

            // Process list HTML rendering
            if (cart.length === 0) {
                emptyState.classList.remove('hidden');
                // Clean prior elements
                const priorItems = list.querySelectorAll('.tray-item-rendered');
                priorItems.forEach(el => el.remove());
            } else {
                emptyState.classList.add('hidden');
                
                // Clear old elements
                const priorItems = list.querySelectorAll('.tray-item-rendered');
                priorItems.forEach(el => el.remove());

                // Build each tray item card
                cart.forEach(item => {
                    const card = document.createElement('div');
                    card.className = "tray-item-rendered bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-creamery-creambase flex justify-between items-start gap-4 shadow-sm hover:border-creamery-raspberry transition-all";
                    card.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-xs text-creamery-maroon leading-tight">${item.name}</h4>
                            <p class="text-[10px] text-creamery-raspberry font-semibold">Price: $${item.price.toFixed(2)} each</p>
                            <span class="inline-block text-[9px] px-2 py-0.5 bg-creamery-cream border border-creamery-creambase text-creamery-maroon rounded font-bold">Qty: ${item.quantity}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex flex-col items-end gap-3">
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-creamery-maroon">$${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}</span>
                            <button onclick="removeCartItem('${item.id}')" class="text-creamery-raspberry hover:text-red-700 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Remove</button>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    list.appendChild(card);
                });
            }

            // Calculation Tallies
            document.getElementById('cart-subtotal').innerText = `$${subtotal.toFixed(2)}`;
            
            let discount = 0;
            if (appliedPromo) {
                discount = subtotal * 0.15;
                document.getElementById('discount-row').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('cart-discount').innerText = `-$${discount.toFixed(2)}`;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('discount-row').classList.add('hidden');
            }

            const total = subtotal - discount;
            document.getElementById('cart-total').innerText = `$${total.toFixed(2)}`;
        }

        function toggleCartDrawer(show) {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('cart-drawer');
            if (show) {
                drawer.classList.remove('translate-x-full');
            } else {
                drawer.classList.add('translate-x-full');
            }
        }

        function applyPromoCode() {
            const input = document.getElementById('promo-input');
            const code = input.value.trim().toUpperCase();

            if (code === 'SWEETDREAMS') {
                appliedPromo = true;
                updateCartUI();
                triggerToastNotification('Succesfully applied promo SWEETDREAMS (15% discount)! 🎉');
                document.getElementById('promo-btn-txt').innerText = "Code Applied!";
                document.getElementById('promo-btn-txt').disabled = true;
            } else {
                triggerToastNotification('Apologies, that promo code appears invalid.');
            }
        }

        function requestCheckout() {
            if (cart.length === 0) {
                triggerToastNotification('Please fill your customizer tray first before sending orders.');
                return;
            }

            // Close tray panel
            toggleCartDrawer(false);

            // Generate mock tracking delivery transaction ID
            const trackingId = '#CA-' + Math.floor(10000 + Math.random() * 90000);
            document.getElementById('order-id-display').innerText = trackingId;

            // Clear state cart details
            cart = [];
            appliedPromo = false;
            document.getElementById('promo-input').value = "";
            document.getElementById('promo-btn-txt').innerText = "Apply Code";
            document.getElementById('promo-btn-txt').disabled = false;
            updateCartUI();

            // Trigger order receipt popup modal
            document.getElementById('checkout-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function closeCheckoutModal() {
            document.getElementById('checkout-modal').classList.add('hidden');
        }


        // ==================== INTERACTIVE LIVE CHAT SYSTEM ====================
        
        function toggleChat(forceShow) {
            const chatWin = document.getElementById('chat-window');
            if (forceShow === null) {
                chatWin.classList.toggle('hidden');
            } else if (forceShow) {
                chatWin.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                chatWin.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }

        function sendQuickMessage(text) {
            const input = document.getElementById('chat-user-input');
            input.value = text;
            sendUserMessage();
        }

        function sendUserMessage() {
            const input = document.getElementById('chat-user-input');
            const messageText = input.value.trim();
            if (!messageText) return;

            // Render User Bubble
            appendChatMessage('You', messageText, 'text-creamery-maroon/60 bg-creamery-creambase/50');
            input.value = "";

            // Simple responsive bot logic responses
            setTimeout(() => {
                let reply = "I love exploring ice cream questions! For instant artisan cones, try using our Custom Gelato Builder above! 🍦";
                const query = messageText.toLowerCase();

                if (query.includes('vegan') || query.includes('organic')) {
                    reply = "Our Ruby Raspberry Gelato and Wild Berries toppings are completely dairy-free & vegan-friendly! We prepare them in an isolated clean space for pristine diet conditions. 🌱";
                } else if (query.includes('cater') || query.includes('event')) {
                    reply = "Absolutely! We cater private corporate parties, elegant weddings, and birthdays with our mobile ice cream roll-carts. Open the inquiry reservation form on our site to book us immediately! ✨";
                } else if (query.includes('midnight') || query.includes('delivery')) {
                    reply = "Our customizer midnight delivery is live daily! We dispatch all orders within 25-35 minutes using insulated dry-ice packaging to keep your scoops perfectly chilled! 🛵";
                } else if (query.includes('calorie') || query.includes('healthy')) {
                    reply = "Artisan slow-churning yields incredible density, meaning fewer sugars and fats are needed to carry flavor than normal store-bought ice creams. Enjoy clean, wholesome premium dairy goodness!";
                }

                appendChatMessage('Gelato Bot', reply, 'text-creamery-maroon bg-white');
            }, 750);
        }

        function appendChatMessage(sender, text, classes) {
            const stream = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
            const bubble = document.createElement('div');
            bubble.className = "space-y-1";
            bubble.innerHTML = `
                <span class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase block">${sender}</span>
                <div class="p-3 rounded-2xl border border-creamery-creambase max-w-[85%] leading-relaxed ${classes}">
                    ${text}
                </div>
            `;
            stream.appendChild(bubble);
            // Auto scroll downwards
            stream.scrollTop = stream.scrollHeight;
        }


        // ==================== DESIGN TOAST ALERT NOTIFICATIONS ====================
        
        function triggerToastNotification(msgText) {
            // Create a styled alert banner
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = "fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 bg-creamery-maroon text-white text-xs font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-full border border-creamery-cyan shadow-2xl glow-cyan flex items-center gap-2 animate-bounce";
            toast.innerHTML = `<span>🍦</span> <span>${msgText}</span>`;
            
            document.body.appendChild(toast);
            
            // Dissolve Toast
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.add('opacity-0', 'transition-opacity', 'duration-500');
                setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 500);
            }, 3000);
        }


        // ==================== MENU CATALOG FILTERS ====================
        
        function filterMenu(filterValue, tabButton) {
            // Toggle active styling on tabs
            const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.menu-tab-btn');
            tabs.forEach(tab => {
                tab.className = "menu-tab-btn bg-white text-creamery-maroon hover:bg-creamery-creambase font-bold text-xs sm:text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full transition-all border border-creamery-creambase";
            });

            tabButton.className = "menu-tab-btn active bg-creamery-maroon text-white font-bold text-xs sm:text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full transition-all border border-creamery-maroon";

            // Filter item cards
            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.menu-item-card');
            cards.forEach(card => {
                if (filterValue === 'all') {
                    card.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    if (card.classList.contains(filterValue)) {
                        card.classList.remove('hidden');
                    } else {
                        card.classList.add('hidden');
                    }
                }
            });
        }


        // ==================== BOOKING MODAL FOR CATERING ====================
        
        function openBookingModal() {
            toggleBookingModal(true);
        }

        function toggleBookingModal(show) {
            const modal = document.getElementById('booking-modal');
            if (show) {
                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                modal.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }

        function submitCateringForm(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            toggleBookingModal(false);
            triggerToastNotification('Catering inquiry logged successfully! A chef representative will contact you in under 2 hours. 🎩');
        }

        // ==================== NEWSLETTER VIP JOIN ====================
        function subscribeNewsletter() {
            const emailInput = document.getElementById('newsletter-email');
            const feedbackMsg = document.getElementById('newsletter-msg');
            const emailVal = emailInput.value.trim();

            if (!emailVal || !emailVal.includes('@')) {
                feedbackMsg.innerText = "Please provide a valid culinary mail-address.";
                feedbackMsg.classList.remove('hidden');
                feedbackMsg.classList.add('text-creamery-raspberry');
                return;
            }

            emailInput.value = "";
            feedbackMsg.innerText = "✨ Welcome to the Connoisseur Circle! Check your inbox for secret promotions.";
            feedbackMsg.classList.remove('hidden');
            feedbackMsg.classList.remove('text-creamery-raspberry');
            feedbackMsg.classList.add('text-creamery-cyan');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
